college_info.college_name: Srinivas University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Cutoff

highlights.summary:
The Karnataka PGCET 2026 exam for admission to the MBA and MCA courses will be held on May 14, 2026. For the ME/MTech course, the exam is scheduled for May 23, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the scope of job after BSc?
faqs.answer: With BSc degree you are eligible for majority of non technical posts in Government (Central, State, PSU, Banks etc) where eligibility criterion is graduation degree. Beside this you may able to get job of technician, lab assistant in Scientific R&D organisation. You are also eligible to do BEd and take school teacher job. In order to have better career growth you will have to do post graduation.

faqs.question: Which is a good course at Srinivas University, BCA or BBA?
faqs.answer: Both BCA and BBA are good courses offered by Srinivas University. BCA is a course for students interested in the information technology world, while BBA is towards business ventures. The Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA-Hons) programme at Srinivas University nurtures and develops students as young global managers. The programme lays emphasis on preparing students to become competent global business leaders and entrepreneurs by building their capabilities, knowledge, skills, and attitude. The BBA programme at Srinivas University offers various specializations such as General, Rural Management, Crisis Management, Media Management, Hospital Administration, Logistics & Chain Supply Management, Port, Shipping Management & Logistics, Public Administration & Governance (integrated with IAS training), Integrated USA-CMA, International Business, and more.

faqs.question: How safe is the campus of Srinivas University for students?
faqs.answer: To ensure the safety of students, the university takes various measures. There are CCTV cameras installed everywhere. The university is presently creating more rules and regulations for anti-ragging. The university has an anti-ragging committee available in the university.

faqs.question: Does Srinivas University offer any scholarship?
faqs.answer: Yes, Srinivas University offer scholarships to meritorious students. The financial support is offered through academic scholarships and freeships. Apart from this, the university may accept admission through merit and national/general scholarships. In order to apply for admission through scholarship, eligible students can visit the university official website.

college_info.intro:
Srinivas University popular programmes are BTech and BSc. BTech and BSc students are placed in top companies such as Accenture, KPMG, Axis Bank, Motilal Oswal, and others. Srinivas University Mangalore aims to nurture and develop professionals of high quality to cater to the needs of academia and industry. The course curriculum is credit-based and is focused on technology-orientation, industry-linking, and research.
Srinivas University students are taught the required skills and knowledge. They are provided with technical knowledge on various topics. Hence, Srinivas University is one of the best universities present in India. Below mentioned are some of the Srinivas College Mangalore courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

placements.overview: Srinivas University offers placement assistance to students. Srinivas University placements 2024 and 2023 will be updated here once out. Srinivas University is visited by top companies for placements such as Accenture, KPMG, Axis Bank, Motilal Oswal, and others. However, the key highlights of Srinivas University placements 2022 are presented below:

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    BCA students can get upto 15LPA. Srinivas University has an active placement cell and a good placement record for its BCA program. Many top companies recruit students from the BCA program at Srinivas University based on their performance. The BCA program is designed to make students experts in networking, server installation and management, web servers, client-server technology, and web programming with database management. The course adopts the latest technologies into the curriculum and

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Srinivas University offers PG, research, and UG courses to students. These courses are offered across the Engineering, Management, Science, and various other streams. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BSc, BCA, BEd, and other courses to students. At the PG level, the university provides MTech, MSc, MBA, and other courses to students. There are PhD and Dsc courses also available for students. The four-year BTech is available in five specialisations, namely Computer Science Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, , Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, and . Below mentioned are some of the Srinivas College Mangalore courses and :

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to the College of Management and Commerce, students should get a minimum of 25 marks in semester end examinations and a minimum of 25 marks in the internal assessment to pass in the particular subject. For admission to the College of Education, candidates with at least 50% marks either in bachelor's degree and/or the master's degree or any other qualifications equivalent thereto are eligible.For admission to the College of Social Sciences & Humanities, post-graduates in respective disciplines mentioned above with a minimum of 55% marks are eligible to apply. For admission to the Diploma in Engineering/Technology program, candidates passing the Diploma in Engineering/Technology examination with a minimum of 50% marks from AICTE approved Polytechnics are eligible.

reviews_list.batch_info: BCA in Augmented Reality, Artificial Intelligence, and Virtual Reality - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good facilities and campus.

review_content.Placements: In this college, placements are good. They have collaborated with companies like Amazon and Microsoft; this helps in getting placements. They have IBM certificates to help in getting vacancies in big companies. Almost all students got placements through the college in Amazon, Microsoft, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are very good and clean, they have hourly cleaning timings. They have many good labs. In hostels, there is good food and cleaning. The hostels are nearby the college, and there is a pickup bus to go to the hostels, they have Wi-Fi and well-maintained bathrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: BCA in Software Development and Web Design - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement all the time and I see many of my seniors get a happy ending.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of students will enter the college. Average package is 4.29 LPA for 3 years. Recruiting companies were AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft, etc. 60%-80% of students got internships. Roles offered were cloud support, technical analyst, software intern, IT support, and web/app developer (intern level). Another roles were there special teachers come from specialists and they take classes too.
review_content.Infrastructure: Excellent maintenance and health food, all staffs were helpful and nice bathroom and clean. All time hot water was available and water purifiers were there 24 hour. Staff will be there. Security was also there. It was the safest place all time, Wi-Fi was there 5G unlimited and also library.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Mar 2024)-B.Com. in International Accounting with ACCA Integration - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placement assistance provided. 35% of students get placed. Packages offered range from 2.5 LPA to 6 LPA. Large-scale businesses in chartered accountancy offer placements (company names are not acknowledged). The college helps by providing internship placements at Placemantra and assists with further placements. The course focuses on accounts and special positions in corporate.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college facilitates easy access to the library, Wi-Fi, and well-maintained classrooms. The quality of the hostel is moderate. The food quality is just fine. Medical facilities are good. They organize sports events with good standards of achievement.

reviews_list.batch_info: BCA in Software Development and Web Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the current placements, but good faculty members and campus facilities.

review_content.Placements: 40 to 60%. The highest CTC is 3.5 LPA. In my academic years, there were only local companies from Dakshina Karnataka. I think only a few students got internships, like under 10. Most of the students got internships from internship training companies for a fee. Top roles offered are business development executive or associate, and similar.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a new campus for the ICIS department with large lab facilities. One single lab can handle 100+ students. There is a big 86-inch Samsung smart monitor in every class. Also, there are projectors and chalkboards. We have a library with digital access too. Classrooms are equipped with charging sockets and a great amount of space.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I would not recommend anyone to get admission at Srinivas University.

review_content.Placements: I don't know about placements. They said that they'll provide placements for us. I don't know what is ging to happen if they do or not. I am studying in the 3rd year. My 5th semester hasn't started yet. I am on vacation now after the 4th semester.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are some low-level benches and desks. The infrastructure is not worth what we pay as a college feels. There is no Wi-Fi in the beginning and it is only for limited people and for some, it will not connect. Sports and games are also not that good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Mar 2024)-B.Com. in International Accounting with ACCA Integration - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It has a good campus.

review_content.Placements: There are good placement facilities. More than 60% of students have been placed. The highest package is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 4.5 LPA. Many companies visited for the recruitment, like MNCs. I am studying for the B.Com for the role of ACCA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our college are good. The hostel and the quality of food are good. There is a canteen in our college. It provides good and healthy food.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are more helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality of each teacher is good because they teach us in a proper manner, and each of them is friendly to everyone. There is a good ambiance around our college regarding the faculty members.

overview_faqs.question: Is Srinivas University a good university?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Srinivas University is a good university. Srinivas University is a private skill-focused and research university located in Mangalore. This university (one of the 18 Srinivas Group of Institutions) was established in 2013 by the Karnataka State Act. Srinivas University Mangalore offers PG, UG, and research programmes under 9 faculties/institutes with about 71 programmes.

admission_overview.college_name: Srinivas University Admission 2025: Courses, Fees, Eligibility & Selection, Application Process

admission_process.title: Srinivas University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Srinivas University admission2025is entrance-based for all the courses. The university conducts in-house entrance examinations for selection. However, entrance exams such as KCET, and Karnataka PGCET are also accepted for course admissions. The university offers undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes in various streams such asHotel Management, Medicine and Health Sciences, IT and Software,Business and Management Studies, Engineering, etc.

ForSrinivas University admissions, eligible candidates can visit the official website of the University and register online, till the seats get filled. Moreover, the university also offers scholarships to encourage young minds. Before applying for any of theSrinivas University courses, aspirants are advised to check the eligibility and selection criteria.

Candidates seeking admission have to go through the entrance test approved by the university for selection. The university has prescribed eligibility and selection criteria for each of the programmes. A few important highlights related to theSrinivas University admission criteriafor some popular courses are mentioned in the table below:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria

For admission at the university, aspirants have to go through the complete process that involves online registration, release of cutoff marks, selection rounds, and seat allotment.Srinivas University admission criteriais entrance-based for all the programmes. The educational qualification required for selection varies for each course. Details about each of the stages in the admission process are provided below:
STEP 1: Srinivas University Application Process 2025

The university application form can be downloaded from its official website (srinivasuniversity.edu.in). It can then be filled out carefully and submitted at the admission office in person. In addition, aspirants must pay the application fee online as well. The link for the same is activated on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Release of Cutoff List

Following the application process, the university releases the merit/cutoff list.Srinivas University cutoffindicates the minimum score required in the respective exam for selection. The merit list of the university exam shall also be available on the official website/notice board of the university. Candidates who meet the cutoff criteria can be called for an interview/selection round.
STEP 3: Seat Allotment & Admission Confirmation

Selected candidates shall further be called for document verification and fee payment. During document verification, students shall have important documents copies and originals. At that time, aspirants can be asked to pay some amount of the admission fee for seat confirmation.

faqs.question: What are the minimum marks required to get a seat at Srinivas University?
faqs.answer: For admission to the College of Management and Commerce, students should get a minimum of 25 marks in semester end examinations and a minimum of 25 marks in the internal assessment to pass in the particular subject.For admission to the College of Education, candidates with at least 50% marks either in bachelor's degree and/or the master's degree or any other qualifications equivalent thereto are eligible.For admission to the College of Social Sciences & Humanities, post-graduates in respective disciplines mentioned above with a minimum of 55% marks are eligible to apply.For admission to the Diploma in Engineering/Technology program, candidates passing the Diploma in Engineering/Technology examination with a minimum of 50% marks from AICTE approved Polytechnics are eligible.

placement_report.college_name: Srinivas University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Srinivas University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Srinivas University placement report 2023 is not released. Earlier, the highest package offered during Srinivas University placements 2022 stood at INR 20 LPA . Further, the mean and median package offered during Srinivas University placements 2022 stood at INR 4.5 LPA and INR 10 LPA , respectively. Further, the placement rate recorded during Srinivas University placements 2022 was 100%. Other than this, more than 300 offers were made and 180 companies visited the campus during Srinivas University placements 2022.

faqs.question: What is the scope of job after BSc?
faqs.answer: With BSc degree you are eligible for majority of non technical posts in Government (Central, State, PSU, Banks etc) where eligibility criterion is graduation degree. Beside this you may able to get job of technician, lab assistant in Scientific R&D organisation. You are also eligible to do BEd and take school teacher job. In order to have better career growth you will have to do post graduation.

faqs.question: How are BCA placements at Srinivas University?
faqs.answer: BCA students can get upto 15LPA. Srinivas University has an active placement cell and a good placement record for its BCA program. Many top companies recruit students from the BCA program at Srinivas University based on their performance. The BCA program is designed to make students experts in networking, server installation and management, web servers, client-server technology, and web programming with database management. The course adopts the latest technologies into the curriculum and has a good placement record, with students getting placed during the fifth semester in leading IT companies like Infosys Technologies, Wipro, Deloitte, Accenture Technologies, and Cap Gemini, among others. The university follows a unique stage-wise campus placement conditioning process for its eligible and registered students.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is Srinivas University. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the QS World University Rankings 2026, the institute ranked #454 under Southern Asia category, and #1401-1500 under Asia. Srinivas University excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around Srinivas University rankings is covered in the following article:

hostel_campus.college_name: Srinivas University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

library.description: It stocks over 64,500 books and subscribes to nearly 120 journals/ periodicals/ magazines. It also offers digital information services such as UGC Info net.,1,500 Scanned Books, 1,600 PDF Books available in library collection.

It stocks over 64,500 books and subscribes to nearly 120 journals/ periodicals/ magazines. It also offers digital information services such as UGC Info net.,1,500 Scanned Books, 1,600 PDF Books available in library collection.

cafeteria.description: All the three existing campuses have Cafeteria facilities which are designed to provide students with a wide range of vegetarian dining options.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and campus.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good and clean, they have hourly cleaning timings. They have many good labs. In hostels, there is good food and cleaning. The hostels are nearby the college, and there is a pickup bus to go to the hostels, they have Wi-Fi and well-maintained bathrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement all the time and I see many of my seniors get a happy ending.
reviews.review_text: Excellent maintenance and health food, all staffs were helpful and nice bathroom and clean. All time hot water was available and water purifiers were there 24 hour. Staff will be there. Security was also there. It was the safest place all time, Wi-Fi was there 5G unlimited and also library.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college facilitates easy access to the library, Wi-Fi, and well-maintained classrooms. The quality of the hostel is moderate. The food quality is just fine. Medical facilities are good. They organize sports events with good standards of achievement.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the current placements, but good faculty members and campus facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have a new campus for the ICIS department with large lab facilities. One single lab can handle 100+ students. There is a big 86-inch Samsung smart monitor in every class. Also, there are projectors and chalkboards. We have a library with digital access too. Classrooms are equipped with charging sockets and a great amount of space.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend anyone to get admission at Srinivas University.
reviews.review_text: There are some low-level benches and desks. The infrastructure is not worth what we pay as a college feels. There is no Wi-Fi in the beginning and it is only for limited people and for some, it will not connect. Sports and games are also not that good.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our college are good. The hostel and the quality of food are good. There is a canteen in our college. It provides good and healthy food.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with good infrastructure and placement, but needs a curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Campus wise high with Wi-Fi and dedicated bandwidth when it comes to labs. Well-equipped labs for each department including CSE AIML, mech, etc., are available. Special ventilated and digital with projector, smart boards are available for interactive sessions. A central library is available with a vast collection of books, e-journals, and research papers. There is separate hostel for boys and girls with 2/3 sharing.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Srinivas University.
reviews.review_text: I like to work on computers and develop software so I have chosen this course. We had mini-projects each semester which enhanced our developing software skills and also it was easy when we reached the final project of academics. I was not staying in the college hostel however, had a few friends who were staying in the college hostel the hostel was a little away from the college say 3 km where the college bus would drop them off morning, and evening to the place and there was Srinivas hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, a good library, and qualified teachers. I am fully satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is average.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best universities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel food is very good and unlimited. They provide food 4 times a day. Milk and tea are also provided in the hostel. The registration process is very easy. You have to give your name, pay the hostel fees, and get a room. PGs are also good nearby JECRC University. If you want to live in a PG, you can live.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review from honest student.
reviews.review_text: When it comes to infrastructure, my college has moderate facilities. We have college Wi-Fi, but only 32 MB of data is accessible per day. Every classroom has a projector, fans, and lights. The hostel is also good, with 24/7 electricity, two fans in each room, and elevators. The food is moderate, and sports accessories are also moderately available.

reviews.review_heading: I’m very satisfied and also got placed in one of the startup companies before completing my degree.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent infrastructure for software development and web designing courses. However, the equipment for cloud computing and AI could be improved. The college building is impressive with a beautiful ambiance. The classrooms are spacious with smart class facilities. Canteen and mess facilities are provided and are decent. Wi-Fi is not provided for personal use. Overall, it's a great place to learn with some room for improvement.

reviews.review_heading: Strong infrastructure and facilities with decent placements, but scope for industry tie-ups.
reviews.review_text: Our department is equipped with modern labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean and well-maintained. The quality of food is served in the mess and a variety of options are available in the canteen. We have basic medical facilities. 24/7 health center is available. There are sports grounds for games like cricket, football, and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Srinivas institute of nursing sciences.
reviews.review_text:
College has 4 floors. 
Ground floor = 1st-year GNM classroom, computer lab, library, stationery store, office, and principal chamber. 
1st floor: anatomy lab, community lab, 2&3 GNM classroom, nutrition lab, OBG lab, staffroom 
2nd floor: pediatric lab, staffroom, 1, 2, 3 & 4-year B.Sc. classroom
3rd floor: auditorium, foundation lab
Each floor has ladies and guest toilets. The hostel has 6 floors. 
Ground floor: mess, warden's room, office 
1st floor: engineering students 
2nd floor: pharmacy s...

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best universities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel of our college is very good as each room of our hostel is very good. Around two should stay in one room. Facilities inside the room are very good. We have a good canteen facility. The food served in the canteen is very good. A variety of items are available in the mess.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Srinivas University

likes.text: Companies like IBM, Infosys, and Accenture visit our college for placements of students.

faqs.answer: A:    The highest package offered at SKUAST (Sher-e-Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences and Technology of Kashmir) Jammu is INR 45,000 per month. The average package offered is INR 30,000 per month, with a lowest salary of INR 15,000 per month. The median package offered to PG (2-year) students during Sher-e-Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences and Technology of Kashmir placements 2022 stood at INR 28.07 Lakh Per Annum.
faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at SKUAST?

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
SKUAST Jammu offers 6 base courses namely, BSc, BVSc, MSc, MVSc, MBA, and PhD. There are various specialisations for each base course in the field of Agriculture, Veterinary Science, Basic Science and Bio-technology. The university also offers diploma and certificate courses. faqs.answer: A:    Aspirants seeking admission to SKUAST BSc (Hons) must complete Class 12 or an equivalent examination from a recognised board with PCB/ PCM/ PCBM/ Agriculture (with Science subjects), besides English with 50% aggregate for OM, NRI/ NRI-sponsored category. The aggregate required is 40% for reserved categories. Candidates from states/ UTs other than Jammu and Kashmir & Ladakh can only seek admission under the NRI/ NRI sponsored quota for BSc (Hons) Agriculture, BSc (Hons) Horticulture and against Self Financing, seats for PG courses kept under the All India Basis category.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sher-e-Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences and Technology of Jammu.

review_content.Placements: There are no placement programs in this college. Training and internships are offered by prestigious universities. Top recruiting companies are Bayer, etc. Few students are eligible for international internships for 2 months in America.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our university has all equipment and chemicals in the laboratory. Classrooms are air-conditioned. It also has smart boards for better learning.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable. Teachers are regularly monitored by the Dean and VC. They also conduct classes regularly. They provide practical experience to students. At the end of the degree, a RAWE program is conducted through which ground-level knowledge is accumulated. This university keeps a close eye on the teaching staff members and course curriculum. All professors are dedicated to their work.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Vegetable Science - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: There are good infrastructure and facilities here.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell is not very active in this university. Students may need to find jobs and internships programs on their own. The placement cell sometimes provides information regarding jobs and internships on WhatsApp group but without any follow-up from them.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and department are highly functional here. The hostels are very good with every facility, and a medical centre is available near the hostel only. A gym and sports centre for sports and games are available. A shopping complex has been established where daily needed things can be purchased. There is a canteen facility, but it is not up to the mark. Library facilities are commendable. A highly equipped library with online facilities is available.

faqs.answer: SKUAST Jammu does not offer direct admission. Aspirants first need to fill out the application form for the preferred course and then appear for SKUAST-J CET conducted by the university. SKUAST-J CET for UG courses is offered for a duration of three-years. For PG courses, the duration is two and a half year. individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Information regarding our college.

content.Placements: Colleges offer placements and study is very good. Agriculture offers lots of scope in this field and it also gives students practical knowledge. Agriculture is the main source of income it has many career opportunities for students and college is also good.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels have good infrastructure and more hostels are also in progress. Attendees and warden are good. Hostel has good facilities like washing machines and parking space. Food is also good and timing provided is on basis of students care.

individual_reviews.course: M.V.Sc in Vety. Pharmacology & Toxicology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A detailed review of Veterinary College, SKUAST-Jammu.

content.Placements: There are around 4-5 postgraduation seats in each department. Students receive decent salary packages ranging from 5 LPA - 1.5 crore per annum, in many pharmaceutical and feed companies like Intas, Venkys, and Mother Dairy. The university organizes academia-industry meetings to help place deserving students easily.

The college library is huge and contains thousands of books from all sectors of veterinary and animal sciences. Hostels offer single seater, double-seater, and NRI quota rooms, a gym, a mess providing decent food and medical facilities during office hours. There is a large playground for outdoor sports and a hall for indoor games.

admission_overview.college_name: SKUAST Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: SKUAST Jammu Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SUKAST admissionis based on SKUAST J-CET (SKUAST Jammu common entrance test) conducted by the university.Sher-e-Kashmir University of Agriculture Science and Technology (SKUAST) Jammuis a state University, accredited by the National Agricultural Education Accreditation Board, ICAR. The university offers UG, PG, diploma, certificate, and doctoral degrees in Agriculture, Animal Husbandry, and Veterinary Science. The University has four departments that offer 67 courses.

SKUAST Jammu admits students of UG and PG based on an entrance test conducted by SKUAST Jammu called SKUAST J-CET. Another way to take admission in SKUAST is through the CUET test for free seats only. The entrance test is mandatory for all students except self-finance or students allotted seats by the state government. Few in-service students are nominated by the state govt. on free seats. The table below gives a brief ofSKUAST admissionhighlights:
Particulars
SKUAST Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
UG courses:INR 21,300 - INR 28,800
PG courses:INR 27,500 - INR 2.4 lakh
How to apply?
https://skuast.org/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

SKUAST offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. Candidates need to meet the eligibility criteria set for the applied programme. The basic eligibility is Class 12 for UG courses whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Below areSKUAST coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Bachelor’s degree in the respective/ related subjects with a minimum of 55%-60% aggregate
MAT,CAT,CMAT+ GDPI

SKUAST total fee includes multiple components such as admission fee, tuition fee, examination, caution deposit, etc. Some of the fee components are one-time payable at the time of admission. While aspirants need to pay tuition fees every semester. Below areSKUAST feeand intake:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Out of the total intake, the university reserves some seats for reserved category candidates. Below is category-wise SKUAST reservation:

SKUAST conducts its own entrance exam for admission to UG and PG courses. Besides, aspirants also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility requirements for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in SKUAST Jammu:
STEP 1: SKUAST Jammu Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for the preferred course. Aspirants need to fill out the form and pay an application fee of INR 2,000 for UG and INR 2,500 for PG programmes.
STEP 2: Selection

SKUAST shortlists candidates for UG and PG courses based on SKUAST-CET score. Admission to the seats under the ICAR quota will be made on the basic list provided by ICAR via All India Counselling by ICAR after CUET.
STEP 3: Merit List and Counselling

Once the selection rounds is over, the university releases a category-wise merit list. All the selections made by the university to UG and PG courses is provisional till final verification of eligibility of the candidates. Qualified aspirants, as per merit, are called for counselling on a specified date and time for consideration of admission to various courses. Selected aspirants have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
For more information about Sher-e-Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences and Technology of Jammu Admission Process check out the below video:

courses_data.description: SKJUST offers a three-year BSc (Hons) programme inAgricultureand Horticulture specialisations. Candidates need to pass a minimum of Class 12 or equivalent examination withPhysics, Chemistry,Biologyor PCM or PCMB or Agriculture withEnglishwith at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for BSc (Hons) course. The selection for BSc (Hons) is based on SKUAST-J CET. Admission for free or self-financing seats in ICAR quota is through All India Counselling by ICAR after CUET conducted by NTA.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Sc at SKUAST?
faqs.answer: SKUAST Jammu has a total intake of176. Candidates are offered seat in BSc (Hons) based on SKUSAT-J CET score. Selected aspirants need to participate in SKUAST Counselling round. courses_data.name: SKUAST Jammu MSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: SKUAST Jammu offers two-year MSc course at the PG level. The university offers MSc in Agriculture, Horticulture,Forestryand Agricultural Engineering. Candidates who have passed a bachelor's degree in related subjects with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for reserved category) can apply. The university also offers MSc in Basic Sciences. Aspirants with a bachelor's degree with at least 55% aggregate can apply for Basic Sciences.

faqs.question: Is MSc available at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: Yes, SKUAST Jammu offers two-year MSc course spread across four semesters. MSc is available in Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry and Agricultural Engineering. Candidates can also apply for MSc in Basic Sciences. Aspirants with a bachelor's degree in relevant subjects can apply for MSc programme. The selection for SKUAST MSc is based on SKUAST-J CET score.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for MSc at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: SKUAST Jammu conducts SKUAST-J CET for admission to MSc course. The university conducts the exam for a duration of two and a half years. The exam includes one question paper each for concerned major subject group. The paper include 150 multiple-choice questions, each with four options. For correct answer 1 mark is given and for incorrect answer -¼ mark is deducted.

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying MSc at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for SKUAST Jammu MSc isINR 27,500.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. courses_data.description: SKUAST Jammu offers a two-year MBA programme at the PG level. Candidates who have passed BSc Agriculture/ BVSc & AH/ BTech Horticulture/ BSc Dairying/ BSc Forestry/ BSc Fisheries with at least 55% aggregate can apply for MBA Agriculture Business Management. Aspirants with any other graduate degree with at least 55% aggregate can also apply.

faqs.question: What are the selection criteria for MBA at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: SKUAST Jammu selects candidates for MBA based on entrance exam score and merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants need to have a bachelor's degree in any discipline to apply for MBA. The university also accepts national-level entrance exams such as CAT, MAT and CMAT for MBA admission. Selected candidates are further called for a group discussion and personal interview round.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBA at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass BSc Agriculture/ BVSc & AH/ BTech Agriculture Engineering/ BSc Horticulture/ BSc Dairying/ BSc Forestry/ BSc Fisheries with at least 55% aggregate or equivalent CGPA to apply for SKUAST Jammu MBA programme. Aspirants with any other graduate degree with a minimum of 55% aggregate can also apply.

faqs.question: What documents are required for MBA admission at SKUAST Jammu?

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by SKUAST?
faqs.answer: Yes, SKUAST Jammu conducts SKUAST-J Common Entrance Test for admission to UG, PG and PhD courses. It is a three-year exam for UG and two and a half year exam for PG courses. The paper for UG courses contains 180 multiple choice questions with each carrying on mark. In PG, the exam paper have 150 questions each with four options.

faqs.question: Can I join SKUAST directly?
faqs.answer: SKUAST Jammu does not offer direct admission. Aspirants first need to fill out the application form for the preferred course and then appear for SKUAST-J CET conducted by the university. SKUAST-J CET for UG courses is offered for a duration of three-years. For PG courses, the duration is two and a half year. Once the selection round is completed, the university releases a category-wise merit list. Shortlisted aspirants have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the admission criteria at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: SKUAST accepts UG, PG and PhD students on the basis of valid scores in SKUAST J CET exam.  Aspirants applying through ICAT Quota are offered seats through All India Counselling by ICAR after CUET. Admission under VCI Quota is offered throughNEETbased on the list provided by VCI via their counselling portal.

faqs.question: What is the SKUAST BSc (Hons) selection criteria?
faqs.answer: SKUAST BSc (Hons)admission 2024is entrance-based for the academic year 2024. For Free seats and Self Financing seats (State Domicile), admissions are through:Common Entrance Test through SKUAST-JammuICAR quota through All India Counselling by ICAR after CUETOn the nomination of in-service candidates through state government (only free seats)VCI quota through NEET and based on the list provided by the VCI through their counselling portalFor Self-Financing seats under NRIs/ NRI Sponsored/ All India Basis/ Wards of Serving Employees Categories, admissions are through the University itself based on merit in SKUAST-J CET and marks obtained in Class 12 or equivalent examination.

highlights.description: SKUAST has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #23 in the Agriculture and Allied Sectors category by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. rankings.highlight: 2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Jammu And Kashmir In 2025

nirf.description:
SKUAST has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, SKUAST's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, SKUAST's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, SKUAST fell 3 ranks to #23 rank in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: SKUAST Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Information regarding our college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels have good infrastructure and more hostels are also in progress. Attendees and warden are good. Hostel has good facilities like washing machines and parking space. Food is also good and timing provided is on basis of students care.

reviews.review_heading: A detailed review of Veterinary College, SKUAST-Jammu.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are digital and laboratories are well equipped with all the equipment for high quality research in pharmacology and toxicology. The college library is huge and contains thousands of books from all sectors of veterinary and animal sciences. Hostels offer single seater, double-seater, and NRI quota rooms, a gym, a mess providing decent food and medical facilities during office hours. There is a large playground for outdoor sports and a hall for indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sher-e-Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences and Technology of Jammu.
reviews.review_text: Our university has all equipment and chemicals in the laboratory. Classrooms are air-conditioned. It also has smart boards for better learning.

reviews.review_heading: There are good infrastructure and facilities here.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and department are highly functional here. The hostels are very good with every facility, and a medical centre is available near the hostel only. A gym and sports centre for sports and games are available. A shopping complex has been established where daily needed things can be purchased. There is a canteen facility, but it is not up to the mark. Library facilities are commendable. A highly equipped library with online facilities is available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this government university as it is perfect with great exposures.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has the most the biggest library in Jammu and Kashmir with the highest number of books available. There are Wi-Fi, labs, the library, etc. In our campus, we have different 11 blocks for different departments which include minimum 3 research labs in each department with ample of fields with a stream in between for research. There are a student centre, sports complex, sports ground, the largest auditorium of Jammu & Kashmir and large classrooms which can accomodate about 150 students wi...

reviews.review_heading: SKUAS Jammu Sheer e Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available but the infrastructure is not very good. The library is present. Wi-Fi is not working somewhere. Hostel rooms are okay but the food of mess is not good. The money they took from us is pretty high but the quality of the food is not good. The canteen is also present.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good university for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: The hostel, sports complex, food, and cafeteria are the highlights over here. The course and infrastructure are some of the things that are good over here. You will be willing to go to your university if you are admitted over here. Mostly seniors are very helpful over here. No ragging or anything like that happens over here.

reviews.review_heading: Overall its good, I mean you can go for it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is fantastic you can roam around it feels like you are in heaven the weather is good everything, the weather is nostalgic and you can roam here and there are proper bathrooms and restrooms are wuite hygienic and the park are good.

reviews.review_heading: A university which is good but with few cons.
reviews.review_text: If I talk about infrastructure, it's pretty good over here. Hostels are good too:single room for each person (boys) and sharing for girls. Wi-Fi is available, a central library is also available over here. Other than that, AC's are installed in every classroom. Gym facility is also available and there is a sports complex where you can play different games like badminton, table tennis etc.

reviews.review_heading: It's a rough and ready institute. Despite of poor infrastructure academics is really amazing.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Chattha campus is well developed but it's really poor in rs pura campus. Quality of labs is poor. Equipments are also not available many a times. Sophisticated Equipments are usually not available and if available students are not allowed to use them. Sports facility is also poor. Many times students have to arrange for sports gear on their own. Hostels should't be taken into consideration. They are not for humans.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure. It has proper Wi-Fi and library. Not so well-developed labs but classrooms are great. Staffs are very supportive. Food in the hostels is excellent as well as in the canteen. We have a proper sports facility here, and there are frequent games for all students.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Great academics but the infrastructure is quite old.

review_content.Placements: Medical College does not have placement drives but there is a compulsory two-year bond that every MBBS pass out has to do. In which one gets to work in a government hospital at a good salary but there are not a lot of chances that one gets due to passing out of the large number of doctors and not everybody gets bond jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite old. But the good thing Is that it gives you a single seater, double seater and triple seater room in a hostel at a reasonable price. There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel or college. The mess is quite good too. We have our grounds for playing.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Very good medical facilities for learning.

review_content.Placements: All the MBBS graduates are well settled in doctoral life so the rate is 100 percent. Now, the majority of students do internships in hospitals. The packages are determined by the degree or designation level of our graduates. The roles offered are junior president, senior president, assistant professor, associate professor and then professor.
review_content.Infrastructure: All classrooms are well designed and fully air-conditioned. All classrooms are open 24 hours a day for convenient use by students. Hostel rooms have enough space to stay. Mess is available at the hostel. The quality of the food is good and very healthy. Medical facilities are available for any emergency condition, as well as sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Excellent clinical exposure, supportive faculty, and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: MBBS courses in government medical colleges in India, including MLNMC Prayagraj, do not offer traditional campus placements like engineering or management institutes. Medical graduates are required to undergo a Compulsory Rotatory Residential Internship for one year. After this, there is a bond of two years to serve as a government doctor in rural hospitals and PHC centres. After this, some graduates take the NEET PG exam and secure a seat in MD/MS courses to pursue post-graduation. Some graduates directly apply as general physicians in private hospital, PHCs, Tutors, and some open their own clinics.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfaction for academic purpose and surroundings. Seniors are very helpful.

content.Placements: This is the 2020 MBBS batch currently an intern. Our batch of 200 students in which all the students are currently an intern at SRN Hospital. This means there is 100% placement in the same college for an internship. During internships, you prepare for NEET PG and then you go MD or MS. In this college, there is more than 50% of students got into their PG.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the hostel are very good you get a shared room in your early year and then after 3 years, you get a single room. Electricity is always available. Infrastructure is above average. There are multiple mess and each of them serves good hygienic food and a water cooler is also there. Classrooms are well-established and AC furnished. Projectors are placed for visual studies.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Great academics but the infrastructure is quite old.

content.Placements: Medical College does not have placement drives but there is a compulsory two-year bond that every MBBS pass out has to do. In which one gets to work in a government hospital at a good salary but there are not a lot of chances that one gets due to passing out of the large number of doctors and not everybody gets bond jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite old. But the good thing Is that it gives you a single seater, double seater and triple seater room in a hostel at a reasonable price. There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel or college. The mess is quite good too. We have our grounds for playing.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very good medical facilities for learning.

content.Placements: All the MBBS graduates are well settled in doctoral life so the rate is 100 percent. Now, the majority of students do internships in hospitals. The packages are determined by the degree or designation level of our graduates. The roles offered are junior president, senior president, assistant professor, associate professor and then professor.
content.Infrastructure: All classrooms are well designed and fully air-conditioned. All classrooms are open 24 hours a day for convenient use by students. Hostel rooms have enough space to stay. Mess is available at the hostel. The quality of the food is good and very healthy. Medical facilities are available for any emergency condition, as well as sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best faculty and best college environment.

content.Placements: As an MBBS doctor, you are able to prescribe medicine to any patient. You can work in any private hospital, or you can apply to a government hospital as well. You may open your own clinic anywhere you want after completing an MBBS from MLN Medical College.
content.Infrastructure: As Motilal Nehru Medical College is one of the old medical colleges in UP, it's infrastructure is amazing, and the quality of life lived in the hostel is very different. You can practice any extracurricular activity on the hostel or college grounds.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best medical colleges of UP and also India.

reviews.review_heading: MBBS done at a low cost and such good faculty, it is worth it .
reviews.review_text: Our college being a government college does not have a great infrastructure. Labs and classrooms aren't air conditioned and Wi-Fi on campus is also not available. Mess is not that bad and hostel is not that great. Don't expect too much from infrastructure .

reviews.review_heading: It is a prestigious government medical college of UP and is one of the oldest colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is just fine. I just know that our college has way better infrastructure than many of the prestigious and old colleges of UP. Food in the mess can't be said great, but good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for medical sciences.
reviews.review_text: The campus may not boast as big an area as other medical colleges like JIPMER or PIMS, but the campus is still huge and very homely. It has a very vast history behind it, and that makes all the students proud. The hospital is massive and is also undergoing construction of another one five times the size of the original one which may increase the already flooding OPD number to five times. Every facility that you can think off is present, ranging from sports games courts, pools, to gyms and librar...

reviews.review_heading: I recommend all students to join this college. It is one of the best colleges in the world.
reviews.review_text: The college has centrally air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi-enabled LCD projectors. Tutorial rooms, a library, a state-of-the-art seminar room, and a fully equipped auditorium with a seating capacity of over 750 persons. The college takes pride in being a different, abled-friendly campus. College infrastructure refers to the physical facilities and resources that support the educational and administrative functions of the institution. This includes buildings, classrooms, libraries, laborator...

reviews.review_heading: Good college life and you won't miss home.
reviews.review_text: As you know about every government college, hostel is like okay. Not so good but you can manage. The best thing about hostel is the interaction with the seniors. They are very helpful and we live like a family. We eat study and play together. Seniors are like our parents. I actually don't miss my home. The college has average labs. Actually, they are improving now. A big ground is also there.

reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure was good. I had a decent college experience.

review_content.Placements: I think 60 percent of students get placed. The highest package offered is 10 LPA. reviews_list.review_title: It is good for studies with well-qualified faculty members, good labs, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 90-95% of students get placed. The highest package is 5 LPA and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities such as a library, computer labs, AI/ML labs, biotech labs, other department labs, AC classrooms (only for 1st year B.Tech), Wi-Fi connection, and canteen are available. Hostel facilities are good but the mess food is not good. It has an Ayurved Hospital. Our college also has a Goel Incubation Centre for start-ups.

review_summary.college_name: Goel Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college placement section must be improved for students.

content.Placements: As the student of Goel Institute Lucknow. I would like to share that the colleges percent of students placed in my course department were about 20 to 30 percent every year. The highest package offered is around 16 Lacs per annum and the lowest package offered is around 8 Lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: As a student of the Goel Institute, Lucknow, I would like to suggest that the facilities and infrastructure available in my course, B.Com (Hons), are very good, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, etc. The quality of the facilities in my hostel, like the mess food, is edible and scheduled.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college placement section must be improved.

content.Placements: As a student of the Goel Institute, Lucknow, I would like to share that the college's percentage of students placed in my course department was about 20 to 30% every year. The highest package offered is around 16 LPA, and the lowest package offered is around 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: As a student of Shri Ram College of Commerce, I would like to suggest that the facilities and infrastructure available in my course, B.Com (Hons), are very good, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, etc. The quality of the facilities in my hostel, like the mess food, is edible and scheduled.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure was good. I had a decent college experience.

content.Placements: I think 60 percent of students get placed. The highest package offered is 10 LPA. I think the top recruiting companies are HAL, HCL, etc. I think there are above-average placements in the Goel Institute of Technology. Different branch has different placements. I think the CS branch has good placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at Goel Institute of Technology and Management is good and suitable for technology education. Classrooms are spacious and well-maintained with proper seating and ventilation. The hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and basic amenities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is good for studies with well-qualified faculty members, good labs, and facilities.

content.Placements: About 90-95% of students get placed. The highest package is 5 LPA and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Wipro, HCL, TCS, Mahindra, Infosys, Axis Bank, Capgemini, Cipla, Cognizant, Coca-Cola, etc. Courses offered by the college are B.Tech (EC, EE, ME, CS AI/ML, IT, BT), B.Pharma, B.A.M.S., M.Tech, BBA, BCA, BFA and BVA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities such as a library, computer labs, AI/ML labs, biotech labs, other department labs, AC classrooms (only for 1st year B.Tech), Wi-Fi connection, and canteen are available. Hostel facilities are good but the mess food is not good. It has an Ayurved Hospital. Our college also has a Goel Incubation Centre for start-ups.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and decent placements with supportive faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 60% of IT students got placed through campus and pool drives. The highest package offered is 13 LPA. The average salary is 3.5 LPA to 4 LPA and the lowest salary is around 2 LPA. Major recruiters included TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, HCL Technologies, and local IT firms. The placement cell is active and provides good support to students in terms of training and interview preparation. Most students also got internship opportunities during the pre-final year, which helped in gaining industry exposure and boosting confidence for final placements.

admission_overview.college_name: Goel Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Goel Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Goel Group of Institutions admissionto all courses is entrance-based. The college offers various courses at undergraduate, postgraduate and diploma levels.Goel Group of Institutionsoffers admission to courses in the field of Pharmacy, Engineering, Commerce and others. Admission to these courses is subject to the performance of the candidate in the entrance exam accepted by the college. Interested candidates must begin their admission process by meeting the course-specific eligibility criteria followed by filling out the application form before the deadline. All the information related to theGoel Group of Institutionsadmission process 2025,along with course eligibility and selection criteria, is available in the below article:

Currently, admissions are open at Goel Group of Institutions. Candidates must check out the application deadline to avoid missing out on any event. Find belowGoel Group of Institutionsadmission highlights:
Particulars
Goel Group of InstitutionsAdmission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Offline
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Online at gitm.goel.edu.in
Level of programmes offered
UG, PG, PhD
Popular programmes
BTech| MTech| MBA

Goel Group of Institutions course admission is entrance-based. Candidates need to pass Class 12 to apply for UG programmes. A graduation is the minimum requirement to apply for PG courses. Further, students are also required to provide valid entrance test scores for admission. The college accepts various entrance exam scores, such as JEE MAINS, CUET, CUET(PG), JEECUP, Lucknow University Centralized Exam and NEET. Find below the top Goel Group of Institutions courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
JEE Mains/CUET UG  + UPSEE Counselling
CUET PG/GATE + Counselling
CUET UG+ UPSEE Counselling
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreGoel Group of Institutions courses
Goel Group of Institutions admission processincludes registration, selection and admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat at Goel Group of Institutions:
STEP 1: Goel Group of Institutions Application Process
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the college. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 to register for a course at the college:
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The college shortlists candidates for all its programmes based on scores of various entrance exams, such as JEE Mains, CUET, NEET, JEECUP and others. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to appear in an entrance exam accepted by the college. Further, candidates are also required to appear in respective counselling for final seat allotment.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once the selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted seats in the college. Candidates need to pay the Goel Group of Institutions fee to confirm their seat at the college.

faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for  Goel Group of Institutions BTech programme. BTech is a four-year programme divided into eight semesters. Admission to BTech is based on entrance exam scores, such as JEE Main, CUET, followed by UPSEE counselling and eligibility criteria set by the college. Once the candidates are selected, they need to come for document verification and fee payment.

placement_report.college_name: Goel Group of Institutions Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Goel Group of Institutions Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Goel Group of Institutions has a Training and Placement (T&P) Cell that helps in shaping the careers of students from their induction and orientation, summer internships, mid-term projects, right to their final placements and even beyond. The final placements at Goel Group of Institutions are a result of very systematic interaction with the industry and continuous career counselling of the students.

The 2024 placement session concluded with 83% of students placed . A total of 500 job offers were distributed among the 390 students placed . The highest package and average package during Goel Group of Institutions placements 2024 stood at INR 15 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively. Additionally, 100 summer internship offers were provided to the students during the 2024 placement drive. The top recruiters of Goel Group of Institutions placements include Axis Bank, TATA Steel, Capgemini, Siemens, Accenture, Piramal Group, Walmart, Google, Tech Mahindra, Amazon, etc.

faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing MBA from Goel Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: An MBA from the Goel Group of Institutions graduation opens all the fields of the economy for the graduates: Placement Rate: The placement rate for the GGI MBA is substantial with approximately 75.1% of the graduates placed in 2023. Salary Packages: The best salary package which was offered to the graduates of MBA is INR 15 LPA and average package ranges around INR 4 LPA. The major recruiters will include Axis Bank, Paytm, Jaro Education, and Siemens among others. The MBA programme specializes in aspects like Human Resource Management, Finance, Marketing, and International Business and thus focuses the graduates on proper career tracks. Jobs available post-MBA vary from management to finance, marketing, human resource management, and operations as roles within a firm or an industry.

hostel_campus.college_name: Goel Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My college placement section must be improved for students.
reviews.review_text: As a student of the Goel Institute, Lucknow, I would like to suggest that the facilities and infrastructure available in my course, B.Com (Hons), are very good, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, etc. The quality of the facilities in my hostel, like the mess food, is edible and scheduled.

reviews.review_heading: My college placement section must be improved.
reviews.review_text: As a student of Shri Ram College of Commerce, I would like to suggest that the facilities and infrastructure available in my course, B.Com (Hons), are very good, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, etc. The quality of the facilities in my hostel, like the mess food, is edible and scheduled.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure was good. I had a decent college experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Goel Institute of Technology and Management is good and suitable for technology education. Classrooms are spacious and well-maintained with proper seating and ventilation. The hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and basic amenities.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for studies with well-qualified faculty members, good labs, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities such as a library, computer labs, AI/ML labs, biotech labs, other department labs, AC classrooms (only for 1st year B.Tech), Wi-Fi connection, and canteen are available. Hostel facilities are good but the mess food is not good. It has an Ayurved Hospital. Our college also has a Goel Incubation Centre for start-ups.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and decent placements with supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: IT department has well-equipped labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a digital library. Hostels are decent with 24X7 water, electricity, and security. Mess food is average but hygienic. Medical aid is available, and sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and staff. The infrastructure is better.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are well-equipped and offer good food in the hostel mess, ensuring better security and safety for students. The cafeteria serves quality meals. The Department of Biotechnology provides excellent vocational education.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Outer infrastructure is good no complaints, building and campus are so clean and green also, with lots of trees and parking space are available. Every department has different buildings, like pharmaceutical department and separate building for GIPS. Courses offered by LU come under GIHSM and GIHS. Ayurvedic department has its other building and engineering and courses offered by AKTU have their separate building. College also has its hospital on campus. Classrooms of our department feel suffocat...

reviews.review_heading: My college gave 100% placement to all children and also good placements in 2015.
reviews.review_text: My campus has Wi-Fi, computer labs, a canteen, a bank branch, and a large ground with ample parking. The facilities in the hostel are of good quality. The mess and canteen offer the best quality of food available. There is a hospital on campus, and the sports ground is quite large.

reviews.review_heading: I love my college. Faculty members are good and polite. Students get good placements every year.
reviews.review_text: We have the best Wi-Fi and a library system. All computers are active and look clean. We have a green campus, which takes me to the way of freshness. There is a big ground for playing students. Many events are held in this playground. Many students take place to perform in these events.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members of the department are the best but HOD is too rude.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available for students in college but available in hostel. Teachers check regularly the attendance of hostel students. Food quality is not so good in the hostel as well as the canteen. Sports are arranged seasonally.

reviews.review_heading: College life is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are at top level. The infrastructure of my college is like a foreign college. My college is placed at very peaceful location. The facilities given in my college are very good like Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, classrooms, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Goel Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The college hostels are something that I would not prefer to join in because there are some very strict rules for the hostel like you cannot leave or enter the hostel after 8 PM. The college hostel does not consist of any gyms, swimming pools, or any other co-curricular activities. The infrastructure of the hostel is good and well-maintained. Security is a major concern for many students. The security provided is very good.

reviews.review_heading: College is given average placement but good facility.
reviews.review_text: The college has advanced laboratories, a smart lab, and a library. The Mechanical Workshop is a common lab for second-year mechanical engineering students and is equipped with state-of-the-art machines. Hostel facilities: GITM has both boys' and girls' hostels. The girls' hostel has a DG set for electricity backup, a geyser for hot water, and Wi-Fi. Other amenities: The college has a canteen, stadium, and temple on campus. It also has a tie-up with nationalized banks, allowing students to open a...

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is professional and well-educated.
reviews.review_text: Goel Group of Institutions has all the necessary infrastructure, including libraries, a clean campus, and good indoor and outdoor playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: Optimum college for the B. Pharm course.
reviews.review_text: The college has good labs and affordable fees as compared to others. For the B Pharma course, it's excellent to choose this college. The library is also good, and great reference books related to B Pharma, like Ross and Wilson's Anatomy and Physiology, etc., are available. The hostel is below average, and the expensive mess is also the worst, so choose wisely.

paragraphs: Goel Group of Institutions fee structure may vary depending on the type of course. Students must note that the total fee charged by the institute can include multiple components, such as tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, and more. Some of these components, such as the security fee, and application fee are one-time chargeable. The tuition fee for various courses is given below:

Yes, Goel Group of Institutions provide various scholarships for students of BTech, BPharm and MBA via UPSEE, Direct admission and RCRL Talent Search. The annual fees for undergraduate courses at Goel Group of Institutions in Lucknow, India, range between 33,000 and 110,754, depending on the course. Here are the fees for some of the courses:

review_summary.college_name: Yenepoya University Bangalore Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Cloud Computing in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college infrastructure is not good, but the lecturers are friendly and good at teaching.

content.Placements: Actually, we are the first batch of the Yenepoya Bangalore campus, and according to them, we will get good placements in top companies like IBM and TCS, which are already integrated with our course. A lot of events and hackathons have already been conducted by them, so we have good hope in that.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is frankly very poor. When I visit for the first time, it is in a big 10 or 15-floor building with a lot of space around it, but the college occupies only 3 floors. The outside area is not completely under Yenepoya.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning with minor in Robotics in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A standard college for studying with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Actually, I am a student from the first batch of this college. The first batch of the Bangalore campus is now in the 4th semester. So, the placements have not yet started on our campus. However, the Bangalore campus of the same college is providing a standard placement percentage.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is well.
content.Faculty: Most faculty members are very well and friendly. Like in every college, there are some faculty members who are rude, and some are not much well, but when compared to many other colleges, faculty members are very helpful and friendly. The exams are not very difficult, and we can clear them easily if we try to study something. The courses are designed properly. They include only the needed things. The syllabus is well-structured, and even a below-average student will be able to understand the concepts easily.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management with minor in Port Management in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Better exposure for learning.

content.Placements: I am the first batch in Yenepoya Bangalore campus, I will only get to know about the placements only after the 5th semester. But to be fair during my 4th semester now the college is conducting mock interviews and more practical activities to help children achieve their goals and get placed in good companies.
content.Infrastructure: We are getting a top-notch infrastructure but the case is not feasible if you are looking for a campus life, as a student of this college. I am totally happy with the limited campus experience because of my personal choices. For your information, hostel facility is not provided by the college but easy availability of PG's are available near the locality.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management with minor in Port Management in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very happy to get admission in this college.

content.Placements: I really don't know about the placement because the college started around 2 years ago in Bangalore, so we do not know about the placement in the college. If we want campus placement, we need above 80% in all the semesters. Placement is decided based on our skills, communication skills, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructures are okay, but there is no campus, so we can't experience campus life. But, the infrastructure is very good with smart class, full-time AC, Wi-Fi, library, all there. I am staying at a PG, so I don't know about the hostel. Facilities and infrastructures are okay, but there is no campus.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence, Robotics and Internet of Things in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College review based on personal experience.

content.Placements: We are the first batch of Yenepoya Bangalore so as of now I can't provide details about the placements. I know that our college is providing placements for students who are interested. The average package they are providing is around 6 LPA. Companies like IBM TCS Microsoft etc. are offering placement opportunities, as our college has collaborations with these companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is pretty good but the hostel is very bad. They don’t provide WiFi for students but the campus has WiFi connections. We have a computer lab with a capacity of 120 seats and classrooms also have a capacity of 120 students. The library has very useful books. The quality of the hostel is bad, as they don’t provide enough quality and quantity of food. They charge 1.3 LPA, but it isn’t worth it, and the room is too small for four people. The college has stopped providing hostel facilities due to many problems.

As per the Yenepoya University fee structure, the total tuition fee for MSc courses ranges from INR 80,000 to INR 10 lakh. This happens because the university offers MSc courses via many affiliated colleges. The fee may vary for each institute.
Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

Yes, Yenepoya University Bangalore offers scholarships to the meritious and deserving students. While applying for the scholarship, candidates need to keep a few details handy, such as Class 10 and 12 percentages. Students need to keep their scholarship reference ID handy which will be provided by the admission counsellor.

Yenepoya University offers BTech, BSc, MTech, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG levels. The selection criteria are merit or entrance-based.The institute offers more than 70 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time.
