individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: If you want a good package, then you should join this college.

content.Placements: Almost 95-96 percent of students in electrical have been placed. The highest package given is 1.2 crore per annum, which was in the field of cybersecurity. The lowest is around 12 LPA, and the average package is around 27 LPA, while the median is around 30 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Texas Instruments, Microsoft, and Nvidia. Around 50 percent of students from electrical engineering grab an internship. Specifically, this year, 55 students got an internship. [8 core and rest non-core ] Top roles include SDE, cybersecurity, VLSI designer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Sometimes there is a problem with Wi-Fi connectivity in our hostel rooms. The library is very good, and it contains all types of books that are required. Classrooms are okay. Labs are very good, but some of the equipment has mechanical errors. The medical facility is excellent. Food quality depends on which type of mess you have joined, like in a sattvik mess, where Jain food is served, the quality of food is excellent compared to other messes. The sports facility is also very good. The canteen also provides good food.

admission_overview.college_name: IIT BHU IIT Varanasi (BHU) Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Selection

admission_overview.title: IIT BHU Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: IIT BHU Varanasi Admission 2025 is currently ongoing and is primarily entrance-based. The candidates are selected through national-level tests conducted by various authorities. Popular as IIT Varanasi (BHU), the Indian Institute of Technology Varanasi offers a range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in Engineering, Science, and Humanities. It runs under the Banaras Hindu University. It offers degree programmes like BTech, BTech-MTech (Dual Degree), BArch, BPharma, MTech, MPharma, MSc, and PhD. IIT Varanasi application form 2025 for all these courses can be filed by visiting the official website of the respective national/ state-level exams. However, PG applicants also need to register on the official admission portal of IIT Varanasi (BHU). Admission to all the courses is based on the scores obtained by the candidates in the respective entrance exams. IIT Varanasi (BHU) has developed an online international summer school on industrial CFD and FEM, a one-month job-oriented training programme.

admission_process.title: IIT BHU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IIT BHU, Varanasi admission process is a multiple-step process. Students can check the points below to know more:
1. IIT BHU Application Process 2025

Candidates seeking admission at IIT BHU are required to complete the application form for the course-specific entrance exam. For example, for BTech, candidates are required to apply for JEE Main, followed by the JEE Advanced application. Similarly, for the MSc, the IIT JAM application form is required to be completed.
2. IIT BHU Selection Criteria 2025

After the conclusion of the application process, students are required to take the course-specific entrance exam, followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After which, counselling rounds are carried out for some of the programmes for the seat allotment process.
3. Admission Confirmation
Candidates selected after all the selection rounds can confirm their admission/seat by paying theIIT BHU fee.

faqs.question: Is BTech integrated programme offered at IIT BHU??
faqs.answer: IIT BHU does provide combined programmes of BTech and M.Tech in many specialisation.These programmes enable the students to pursue both their undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in a combined format.The admission requirements to such integrated courses frequently have a minimum of 75% board examination marks (or equivalent) in Class 12 (or equivalent) besides other conditions.

faqs.question: How to get admission in IIT BHU Varanasi for BTech in 2025?

courses_data.name: IIT BHU MTech Admissions 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:GATE, JEE Main, JEE Advanced, ICAR AIEEA
courses_data.description: Indian Institute of TechnologyBHU offers a two-year MTech programme, which is spread across four semesters. BTech graduates, fulfilling the eligibility criteria can apply for any of the seven MTech specialisations.IIT BHUMTech admission is through the Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (GATE). Candidates shortlisted based on exam scores have to further go through COAP counselling for final seat allotment. Read on to know more about IIT BHU MTech.

faqs.question: Can I do MTech at IIT BHU without GATE?
faqs.answer: As part of the admission procedure, the prospective candidates must also take a Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (GATE).However, BTech qualified in IITs with an overall CGPA of 8.00 or above in 10 point scale are exempted with regard to the GATE and are directly eligible to the process.It is also worth mentioning that the minimum eligibility requirements are as well mandatory to the candidates who would like to join IIT BHU MTech programme in 2025.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to the M.Tech programme at IIT BHU?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for the M.Tech programme at IIT BHU the aspiring candidates need to have a minimum of 60% in BTech. Aspirants with a score equal to or more than the cutoff also have to go through a counselling round. Once selected, aspirants have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for M.Tech course at IIT Varanasi?
faqs.answer: The application fee for the Master of Technology course at IIT Varanasi is similar to the application fee for GATE. This year, the application fee for the GATE goes slighltly higher. See the following columns for the updated fee:CategoryRegular PeriodDuring the Extended PeriodFemale/SC/ST/PwD* candidates (per test paper)10001500All other candidates including foreign nationals (per test paper)20002500

courses_data.name: IIT BHU MSc Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Indian Institute of Technology BHU Varanasi MSc admission is based on the applicant's CUET-PG score or IIT JAM. Shortlisted candidates also have to go through counselling for the seat allotment process. Aspirants seeking admission must hold a valid BSc degree with at least 50% aggregate. Candidates can apply through the CUET-PG admission portal. Read on to know more about IIT BHU MSc programme.

faqs.question: Does IIT BHU offers MSc?
faqs.answer: Yes, IIT Varanasi does offeres one postgraduate course in basic Sciences, name Master of Science (MSc). It is a full-time MSc programme offered in two specialisations. The programme is offered for a duration of two years, spread in a semester pattern.The key highlights of IIT BHU admission to the MSc are given below:ParticularsMSc HighlightsEligibilityBachelor’s degree with a minimum of 55% aggregateSelection CriteriaIIT JAM(seats allotted based on three rounds and two special rounds of CCMN Cou

faqs.answer: GATE qualifying cutoff is institute eligibility cutoff, and on other hand, GATE admission cutoff ensures a call for admission at IITs, NITs, IITs, and CFTIs. faqs.question: How can I get admission in BHU IIT?
faqs.answer: The students who wants to get admission into BHU IIT, Varanasi must meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the course. They must appear and clear the JEE Mains and JEE Advanced exams to qualify for further admission process. For the BTech course admission students must complete class 12th from recognised board with minimum 75% marks. Then they must appear forJoSAAcouncelling process.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for IIT BHU MTech?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have BE/BTech/MSc or equivalent with (a) CGPA 6.00 on a 10-point scale or 60% marks in aggregate for General/OBC (Non Creamy Layer)/EWS. Category with valid GATE score BTech from IITs with CGPA of 8.00 without GATE are also eligible for admission. AMIE / Grad. IETE are eligible for the M.Tech programme at IIT BHU.

faqs.question: Till which date can I fill the choices in JoSAA counselling?
faqs.answer: The dates for JoSAA counselling 2026 choice filling will be announced once the result of JEE Main 2026 is declared. Candidates can fill choices only during the choice filling period. Also, candidates need to lock their choices before the last date.

placement_report.college_name: IIT BHU Placements 2026: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: IIT BHU Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: IIT BHU placement report 2026 is released. As per the latest data released, the overall highest and average package received during IIT Varanasi placements 2026 was INR 1.67 Crore per annum and 29 LPA . A total of 1,228 full-time offers and 292 PPOs were made. The top recruiters included Google, ZS Associates, ICICI Bank and Meesho .

A total of 17 students received salary package above INR 100 LPA during IIT BHU Varanasi placements 2026. Most number of offers were made for SDE roles followed by ML/Quant, Analytics, Product and Core Engineering roles during IIT BHU placements 2026.
Earlier, during the 2024-25 session , the highest and average stipend recorded was INR 5 lakh and 1.04 lakh per month .
Placement data 2026 mentioned above is updated till Feb, 2026.

description: IIT BHU cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BTech, MSc, MTech, and other courses. Students can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIT BHU JEE Advanced cutoff 2025, along with other exams for different courses, rounds, categories, etc. Further details regarding the latest exam events are below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view the IIT BHU year-wise cutoff ranks for different categories belonging to the AI quota. Click on the 'Download Now' link to view the JEE Advanced cutoff details for the Indian Institute of Technology BHU.

IIT BHU cutoff 2026 is expected to be released tentatively in the month of June 2026. In the meantime, candidates preparing for JEE Advanced can refer to the table below to view the cutoff ranks for the last year's first and last rounds for admission to B.Tech. and other courses. During the IIT BHU JEE Advanced cutoff 2025 in the last round, the highest cutoff rank reached 14447 under the B.E. / B.Tech course for the General AI category students. With a lowest last round cutoff rank of 1489, B.T

IIT BHU B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 1489 and 14447, wherein the most sought-after specialisation for admission was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with the lowest JEE Advanced cutoff rank. On the contrary, the easy-to-grab specialisation was B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing, followed by B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering, with lenient JEE Advanced cutoff ranks of 1924 and 2635, respectively, in the General AI category.

JEE Advanced is the accepted exam for admission to the Engineering course, followed by the JoSAA counselling process for all the IITs, including IIT BHU. Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view all the important JEE Advanced 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling was conducted in multiple rounds for admission to the IITs, NITs, IIITs, and GFTIs. Candidates with a valid JEE Advanced 2025 score can participate in JoSAA for BTech admission at IITs. Conducted by the Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA), in 2025, a total of six seat allotment rounds were released for admission. Aspirants preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated round and year-wise JEE Advanced cutoff lists for IIT BHU to un

IIT BHU JEE Advanced cutoff 2025 was announced for different specialisations and categories. In this section, candidates can do a comparative analysis of different colleges, and specialisations offered as per the JoSAA last-round closing ranks. Students can use the provided filters to refine their search based on parameters, like location, gender, categories, etc.

IIT BHU JAM cutoff 2026 for M.Sc. admission has yet to be released. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view last year's cutoff data and estimate the upcoming cutoff. The IIT JAM 2025 cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks across categories under the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the last round of the IIT BHU M.Sc. cutoff 2025 ranged from 325 to 409, with M.Sc. in Chemistry being the most competitive for admission. In the first round, the closing rank for

IIT JAM last round cutoff ranks over three years are presented in the table below. Students can use the provided filters and choose the rounds and categories to view the cutoff data. Considering the last year's cutoff data, M.Sc. in Chemistry had the lowest cutoff for admission in the last round. This indicates that demand for this specialisation was high in 2025 as compared to other MSc specialisations among the General AI category students. In the last round, the closing rank for this branch w

Indian Institute of Technology, BHU, Varanasi admits students to its MSc courses based on candidates' performance in the IIT JAM entrance exam. Aspirants with a valid score are then called for the counselling round for final seat allotment. Candidates preparing for admission can check out the important dates for IIT JAM 2026 to be eligible for admission to the MSc courses.

In 2025, four admission lists were released for IIT JAM for admission to the MSc course across multiple specialisations at Indian Institute of Technology, BHU, Varanasi. highlights.description: IIT BHU is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national & international ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #31 in the Overall category, #10 under Engineering, and #22 under Research Institutions. Talking about the international rankings, the QS World Rankings 2025 has awarded rank #531 to IIT BHU. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in IIT BHU rankings.

rankings.highlight: 2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttar Pradesh In 2025
4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttar Pradesh In 2025
4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttar Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, IIT BHU outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. IIT BHU's rankings in 'Overall' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, IIT BHU fell 1 rank to #31 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Engineering' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, IIT BHU's rank is #10, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is noticeable that in the 'Innovation' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, IIT BHU's rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
IIT BHU has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, IIT BHU fell 35 ranks to #566 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IIT BHU climbed 36 ranks to #237 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IIT BHU climbed 12 ranks to #49 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Explore the IIT BHU latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

reviews.review_heading: If you want a good package, then you should join this college.
reviews.review_text: Sometimes there is a problem with Wi-Fi connectivity in our hostel rooms. The library is very good, and it contains all types of books that are required. Classrooms are okay. Labs are very good, but some of the equipment has mechanical errors. The medical facility is excellent. Food quality depends on which type of mess you have joined, like in a sattvik mess, where Jain food is served, the quality of food is excellent compared to other messes. The sports facility is also very good. The canteen ...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my college IIT BHU because of facilities and good placement in 2026.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good at IIT BHU. Wi-Fi covers the entire campus, and classrooms are fully modernized. There are 4 lecture theatres in our college. For freshers, IIT BHU has the best hostel among all IITs, named PC Ray Hostel, which covers all required infrastructure and is newly made, so it looks aesthetic as well. There are 3 huge grounds in IIT BHU, which cover facilities for all sports. We have SAC for indoor games and a newly made gym, which is the biggest sports auditorium as well.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college ancient college in India.
reviews.review_text: There is a wide range of books available in our college. The variety of books is very nice. There we get books of spirituality, competitive exams, novels, biographies, self development and many more. The classrooms of our college are decent. The facilities is vey nice. The sports facilities in our college are excellent. There are 23 sports that are introduced in our college. In our college there are multiple clubs for the interests of every individual in our college. Our hostel is the newly ...

reviews.review_heading: IIT Bhu is a vibe, go enjoy it.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library named the Shrinivas Despande Library. It had a vast collection of the latest and historical books. The facilities in the classroom were the latest but they do not have AC in the classroom but it contains a smart board, a green board and a projector. Our college had a gym which had the latest equipment and also three grounds. 2 volleyball court 2 lawn tennis court and many more courts for different games. Mainly, our college had a building name sac which contains all ind...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is nice we love it.
reviews.review_text: We have good food, a mess, Wi-Fi, a ibrary and a lot of things. The structure of labs and classrooms is old, it is already a bit old, but new halls are being built which are very good. Initially there are good facilities in the hostel but later on it happens that there is no water and the geyser is facility.

reviews.review_heading: IIT BHU, The best of the most.
reviews.review_text: One thing in which my college lags is infrastructure. It is not as great as other IITs. They are working heavily on improving it. New hostels are being made. Canteen services are being improved. Wi-Fi is good. AC is also being installed.

reviews.review_heading: I have an amazing experience at IIT BHU Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good, but not so cool compared to other IITs. Day by day, infrastructure is getting better. Hostels are also getting renovated, and the new ones are quite good (for 1st and 2nd year). Mess food is obviously very good. The canteen is open till 3 AM, so it's very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: College is the support for all the sports and infrastructure, and the food is good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the hostel are good, with table tennis, volleyball, and a badminton court. Food quality is very nice. Wi-Fi in the classroom is somewhat limited, but in the library it's excellent. An excellent thing about this college is the support for all the sports and infrastructure, and the food is also very good, with a protein-rich diet.

reviews.review_heading: Overview for freshers in 2026.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very modern but its bearable. In recent months it has upgraded a lot by adding ACs and new buildings. Wi-Fi is great all over the campus from the start, hostel rooms and bathrooms are good as well for a government college. There is a variety of food in the mess at a time and the menu is not repeated all week.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college if you are going for placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is okay, the classrooms are old, basically, the whole infrastructure is old. Some buildings are good. First-year hostels are good. The food provided in the mess is good. Sports and games facilities are also good. The infrastructure is kind of old, and we do not have AC in the lecture theatre (now being installed).

reviews.review_heading: My college is good, the best for placements and much more. You will have quality time for a duration
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay, not that good. There is no such AC and no more big building new hostels are being built but those are for seniors because for 1 st year there are good hostels. Sports facilities are not good in hostels. You have to go to college facilities for that, and the medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Best engineering college in Uttar Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my department is good. The past is the nearest department. Hostels have CCTV cameras, a water cooler, vending machines, and a canteen. The quality of the food is good. We have a study room in the hostel. There is a common room on each floor in which we play table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: Lifetime experience in IIT BHU.
reviews.review_text: The library has vast resources, and classrooms are a mix of modern smart rooms and older halls. Hostels are mandatory for B.Tech students & very affordable. Rooms are mostly double/triple sharing for juniors with basic facilities, a bed, table, chair and cupboard. The mess food is average with a varied menu of North/South Indian dishes.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indian Institute of Technology, BHU, Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are old, but everything needed is provided to us. Wi-Fi facilities are absolutely good. Classrooms are okay. The library is an absolute part of our college, and it has all types of book collections needed for a student. The hostel rooms are too cozy and small. The food is not that good in taste, but the quality is good enough.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very modern. The Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. The classrooms, library, and labs are very calm without any disturbance. The hostels and mess are very neat. The college has a hospital. For sports, we have several grounds and a student activity centre.

faculty.faculty_name: Rajeev Srivastava Professor (on deputation as director, IIIT Ranchi)

likes.text: Companies that recruit include almost all reputed software companies like Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Oracle, Sprinkler, Uber, and a whole lot.
I am a mechanical student, and I can suggest CSE, ME, ECE and EE branches for better placements.

college_info.college_name: IIT BHU Scholarship Details

paragraphs: IIT BHU provides merit-cum-means scholarships to 25 percent of undergraduate students. Apart from this, the institute also offers a list of international scholarships, including Rhodes Scholarships 2019, University of Oxford, USIEF Fellowships for Indian Citizens: 2019-2020, Japanese Government [MEXT] Scholarship Program 2019 for Research Students along with many more. All the students (non-sponsored) admitted to MTech and MPharm programmes are provided financial assistance equivalent to the junior research fellowships. All eligible students admitted to PhD programmes also received scholarships from the institute.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements in 2025. Infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: Our batch of B.Tech in computer Science and engineering has around 87% placements. The highest package offered is 12 LPA. Around 75% of students secured internships. Roles offered in top companies are software developer, content developer, software engineer head, and cloud engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our computer science and engineering department offers excellent facilities and infrastructure, including well-equipped computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi classrooms, libraries, and seminars. We also provide 24 x 7 water, electric, and Wi-Fi service.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with the placement scheme.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement scheme for pharmacy students. So no one has ever got a placement from campus. They recommend some recruiting companies like Torrent Pharma, Zydus, Sun Pharma, etc., where we have to apply ourselves. I don't know about the internship program but never heard anyone got one from the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very neat and habitable. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners and they are always clean. The projectors are also there. The library is the best place in the college, it's very quiet and peaceful over there. It contains all kinds of pharmacy-related books so we don't have to buy them from outside the market. They don't have Wi-Fi facility though. College doesn't have a boys hostel. The canteen is okay but the food quality is very low. We have a huge ground for sports activities.

Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences, Architecture & Planning, Business & Management Studies. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. SAL Education boasts an impressive review rating of 4.43 based on student feedback at Shiksha. review_summary.college_name: SAL Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, everything is good here.

content.Placements: Around 64% students got placed in campus placements, the remaining do businesses, startups and some of them were not eligible for campus placements due to low scores. And after all, it also depends on one's technical skills, if we are unable to deliver the required performance, then it's tough to get selected in campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but there are 3 colleges in SAL regarding engineering, Saliter, SCE, SETI, in which Saliter & SETI have their own building, but SCE is combined into SALITER and only in 2-4 classes have AC, while the other just have fans. Labs are good, they have AC, but there is only 1 library in between the whole 3 colleges, and college Wi-Fi is limited to labs only.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members and decent placements with strong campus life and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 70 percent of students in our course got placed through campus placements. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average package is around 5.5 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini and L&T. Nearly 60 percent for the students got internships in companies like TCS, Cognizant and a few startups during their final year. Top roles offered software developer, data analyst, QA engineer and system administrator. Overall, the placement support and guidance from the faculty members are helpful especially for students who actively participated in training programs.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2025. Infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: Our batch of B.Tech in computer Science and engineering has around 87% placements. The highest package offered is 12 LPA. Around 75% of students secured internships. Roles offered in top companies are software developer, content developer, software engineer head, and cloud engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Our computer science and engineering department offers excellent facilities and infrastructure, including well-equipped computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi classrooms, libraries, and seminars. We also provide 24 x 7 water, electric, and Wi-Fi service.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with the placement scheme.

content.Placements: There is no placement scheme for pharmacy students. So no one has ever got a placement from campus. They recommend some recruiting companies like Torrent Pharma, Zydus, Sun Pharma, etc., where we have to apply ourselves. I don't know about the internship program but never heard anyone got one from the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very neat and habitable. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners and they are always clean. The projectors are also there. The library is the best place in the college, it's very quiet and peaceful over there. It contains all kinds of pharmacy-related books so we don't have to buy them from outside the market. They don't have Wi-Fi facility though. College doesn't have a boys hostel. The canteen is okay but the food quality is very low. We have a huge ground for sports activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information and Communication Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great college of engineering.

content.Placements: System analyst, data analyst, network engineer, IT consultant, software developer, web developer, and various roles are offered. Many students get good placements at Sal Education in the ICT branch. From this, you will get a good knowledge of all subjects related to ICT.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and the library are very good. Wi-Fi is a bit poor in the area, but you will get all the needed facilities at Sal Education. There is no hostel for engineering students but classrooms are quite good, air-conditioned, and perfectly cleaned. Overall, the infrastructure is very good.

description: SAL cutoff 2024 for NATA has been released separately by the participating institutes for admission to the BArch course. Candidates can scroll down to check category and year-wise cutoff trends. A few more updates of SAL cutoff are as follows:

The SAL cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the SAL BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing rank was 32627 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence And Machine Learning). The first round cutoff rank

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence And Machine Learning) was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 32627 for the general HS quota.

SAL Education accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to SAL can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

SAL JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for SAL Education.

The SAL GUJCET cutoff 2024 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list for admission to engineering and pharmacy courses at the UG level. The cutoff was released across categories in the AI and HS quotas. Considering the SAL BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the minimum and maximum closing ranks required among the general HS category students were 32627 and 32627, respectively.

SAL accepts the GUJCET entrance exam, followed by a counseling process for admission to its BE and BTech courses. In the table below, candidates can view the past three years' cutoff trends for different courses, specialisations, rounds, and categories.
In 2024, the final round cutoff of the course stood at 32627.

For the academic year 2025, SAL accepts GUJCET 2025 entrance exam score for admission to BE/BTech and BPharma courses followed by the counselling process. The counselling dates are yet to be announced. Candidates seeking admission to SAL can refer to the table below for GUJCET 2025 important dates.

SAL GUJCET 2024 counselling was concluded with the release of the Round 3 Seat Allotment Result. Candidates can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise counselling PDFs to check the GUJCET cutoffs.

hostel_campus.college_name: SAL Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Overall, everything is good here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but there are 3 colleges in SAL regarding engineering, Saliter, SCE, SETI, in which Saliter & SETI have their own building, but SCE is combined into SALITER and only in 2-4 classes have AC, while the other just have fans. Labs are good, they have AC, but there is only 1 library in between the whole 3 colleges, and college Wi-Fi is limited to labs only.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and decent placements with strong campus life and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is quite decent. We have access to well-maintained classrooms with projectors, fully equipped computer labs, and a library with a good collection of academic books and reference material. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus though the speed can vary at times. Hostel facilities are satisfactory, with clean rooms, regular housekeeping, and 24X7 water and electricity supply. The mess served decent food though the variety and taste could be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2025. Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Our computer science and engineering department offers excellent facilities and infrastructure, including well-equipped computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi classrooms, libraries, and seminars. We also provide 24 x 7 water, electric, and Wi-Fi service.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the placement scheme.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very neat and habitable. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners and they are always clean. The projectors are also there. The library is the best place in the college, it's very quiet and peaceful over there. It contains all kinds of pharmacy-related books so we don't have to buy them from outside the market. They don't have Wi-Fi facility though. College doesn't have a boys hostel. The canteen is okay but the food quality is very low. We have a huge g...

reviews.review_heading: Great college of engineering.
reviews.review_text: Labs and the library are very good. Wi-Fi is a bit poor in the area, but you will get all the needed facilities at Sal Education. There is no hostel for engineering students but classrooms are quite good, air-conditioned, and perfectly cleaned. Overall, the infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and my college friends are really good.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure is there. Our campus life is best. There are two big grounds for playing sports and also more than two gardens for enjoying. There are some secret places where we can enjoy our time and have an excellent indoor room for games.

reviews.review_heading: College is good. Try to maintain a good CGPA and acquire skills within 4 years.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not available and the infrastructure is decent but not exceptional. For placements, you have to manage everything on your own because the college only teaches what is required for the syllabus. The courses offered by the college are good and the large campus is there.

reviews.review_heading: Our College Is Very Good for Study Purpose and Technology Side Also.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but our college does not have hostel facilities. It has a big ground where students play football. The infrastructure is pretty good, not very good, but kind of average. Regular activities are done by college students.

reviews.review_heading: Our faculty is the best, good placement in 2020.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not have a hostel. Students live in other hostels, PGs, or their homes, depending on their comfort level and their financial situation.

reviews.review_heading: The experience of SAL Education.
reviews.review_text: The canteen food was not so good. In every semester, our college held a sports program in which interested students could participate. Most of the festivals were celebrated in our college, like Uttarayan and Navratri. For Navratri, there was a garba program held on our campus for two days.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement opportunity.
reviews.review_text: The auditorium at my college is very large and has a lot of seating. The college provides Wi-Fi, but it doesn't always work. The labs, classrooms, and library are neat and clean. The library provides books for free if we have a college ID card. The hostel is not on campus, and the canteen is very bad and expensive. Our college is number one in Ahmedabad for sports and games. The college also provides medical facilities because the nearest hospital is the college's SAL hospital.

reviews.review_heading: SAI education is quality and affordable for everyone.
reviews.review_text: There were several facilities available for students' studies at SAI Engineering College. A large number of cultural programs were organized in the college for the overall development of students in cultural activities. There was also a playground and gym available for students.

reviews.review_heading: A brief introduction to SAL Education of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus is of moderate level, and it includes facilities like a gym, cricket ground, garden, canteen, etc., required for a college student. SAL Education does not provide a hostel facility on campus, so students must find a good PG or hostel near the college or in the science city area. I live in a hostel near the college, and its rent is 1.2 lakh and it has all the facilities needed for a student.

reviews.review_heading: Know Sal Institute of Technology and Engineering Research.
reviews.review_text: In our college, medical facilities, sports, and games are available. There is a canteen. The food served in the canteen is yummy. The college is also big. All facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Placements and infrastructure are disappointing but the curriculum and faculty are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. The classrooms are well-designed. But it only has one library which might get crowded sometimes. There is only one canteen available, hence it gets really overcrowded during lunch hours. Network is a big issue and there is no Wi-Fi available on campus. Labs are also average since all the necessary instruments and machinery are present but it's outdated. The hotel is not bad, the rooms are spacious and the mess's food is not that good. The college doe...

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college life is good here.

review_content.Placements: I am doing an MBBS at RNT Medical College. The class strength is 250 students. It is a 4.5-year course for completion. We are doing an internship and paying service in hospitals as intern doctors after 4.5 years. The salary for an intern doctor is about INR 25,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our class rooms are fully air-conditioned, and the maximum seating capacity is 500 students. They are in a ladder-type manner where the benches are placed. There are two libraries on campus, and all books are available there. The class rooms have Wi-Fi. Food quality is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The best and the worst sides of my college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70% of students are getting placed. The highest package is approx. INR 1 lac, the average is INR 80000, and the lowest is INR 40000. The top recruiting company is MB Hospital. The students who passed the final-year examinations got internships at the hospital nearby. The top role is that of senior doctor, which handles junior president doctors and also interns.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure like classrooms and lecture theaters with audiovisual screens and easy slide study is good. Wi-Fi is always available on college campuses. Labs are there according to subjects, like pharmacology, where there is a pharmacology lab. The library is there, where you can read books from there or issue books for reading at home. Personal reading rooms are there where you can do your own study. The hostel is not at all good; it provides us space to live, but the quality of food is very good in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are nearby, and a doctor is always available there. For sports and games, there are specific gaming areas like badminton courts and tennis courts.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Life at R N T Medical College.

content.Placements: In our batch, 250 students are there. Almost 60-70% of students get placements in PG and medical officer exams by studying in our college. The student package varies according to placement. In the NEET PG 1 year, the salary is around Rs. 60,000-70,000 per month. MBBS offers approximately Rs. 1,00,000 per month. To get selection, it depend on students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is top-notch. Classrooms are fully furnished and led lecturer halls are also there. In our college, there are separate labs according to each department. The mess and the hostel facility are also very good with 24/7 light and water supply. The food quality of the mess is also good. They have many varieties of food. Our college also has a badminton court, basketball court, and swimming pool. In our college, every year a sports week is celebrated in which many other colleges also take part.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in terms of patient flow and clinical exposure.

content.Placements: Our college is one of the famous medical colleges of Rajasthan because of its location and environment. Students are selected in PG exams, INCET, UPSC CMS, and Medical Officer exams. There is a good learning environment and good clinical exposure at the same time.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. The classes are well equipped with A.C. and projectors. We have subject-wise labs for each department and clinical labs. Our hostel is good, with three hostels: SBH, Old JBH, and New JBH. Security is also well managed.

content.Infrastructure: Our class rooms are fully air-conditioned, and the maximum seating capacity is 500 students. They are in a ladder-type manner where the benches are placed. There are two libraries on campus, and all books are available there. The class rooms have Wi-Fi. Food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: Life at R N T Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is top-notch. Classrooms are fully furnished and led lecturer halls are also there. In our college, there are separate labs according to each department. The mess and the hostel facility are also very good with 24/7 light and water supply. The food quality of the mess is also good. They have many varieties of food. Our college also has a badminton court, basketball court, and swimming pool. In our college, every year a sports week is celebrated in which many oth...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in terms of patient flow and clinical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. The classes are well equipped with A.C. and projectors. We have subject-wise labs for each department and clinical labs. Our hostel is good, with three hostels: SBH, Old JBH, and New JBH. Security is also well managed.

reviews.review_heading: The college life is good here.
reviews.review_text: Our class rooms are fully air-conditioned, and the maximum seating capacity is 500 students. They are in a ladder-type manner where the benches are placed. There are two libraries on campus, and all books are available there. The class rooms have Wi-Fi. Food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: The best and the worst sides of my college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure like classrooms and lecture theaters with audiovisual screens and easy slide study is good. Wi-Fi is always available on college campuses. Labs are there according to subjects, like pharmacology, where there is a pharmacology lab. The library is there, where you can read books from there or issue books for reading at home. Personal reading rooms are there where you can do your own study. The hostel is not at all good; it provides us space to live, but the quality of food is very g...

reviews.review_heading: RNT has a healthy environment, well-experienced faculty, good placements, etc.
reviews.review_text:
In RNT Medical College, the classrooms in which all classes are held are fully furnished with LED projectors. The labs have all the equipment required for students practice and are well maintained.
Hostels at RNT Medical College are also good in terms of infrastructure, fully furnished, and well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college, and I recommend that you take admission.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good buildings. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There is a library and a hostel. Every student gets a private room in the hostel. The mess facility is available. The food in the canteen is good. Sports grounds are open.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for MBBS and in college life.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are excellent in our college. Hostels are where most students reside. There are 2 hostels for girls (girls' hostel and PG girls hostel) and 3 hostels for boys (junior boys hostel, senior boys hostel, and PG boys hostel). Junior boy's hostels are for first, second, and third year students, while senior boy's hotels are for fourth and fifth year students. PG students live in the boys' hostels. For girls studying MBBS and PG degrees, there are separate residences for each gender. The hostel...

reviews.review_heading: Very good college for MBBS in Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: The college started in 1960 so mostly buildings are old. There are many new buildings also. There are around 100 classroom with one auditorium, one library and one building for private reading rooms. There are boys hostels and one girl's hostel with medium sized rooms. There are two canteens on campus. Food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: One of best college in Rajasthan for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: There are twenty classrooms with good furniture and air conditioning. College has one big library and personal reading rooms for students. There are four boys hostels and two girls hostel. There is one room allotted to each student. College have indoor playground for badminton and Bollyball but lack ground for football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements every year.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24*7. A night cafeteria is available on campus. The classrooms are huge, with a capacity of accommodating 250 students. The library and personal reading room are available on campus. Food quality is very good at very low prices. There is no mess available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college in the centre of Udaipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty old here. However, there are Wi-Fi enabled libraries and reading halls, swimming pools, a badminton court and table tennis. The quality of food served in the mess is pretty good. New hostels are pretty good and clean since they are newly built.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best college in the best city of Udaipur, Rajasthan & one of the oldest colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and hostel is fantastic. There is a huge building in our college. There are many lecture theatres with an accommodation capacity of 250 students. There are 3 UG boys hostels, 2 PG boys hostels,  1 UG girls hostel and 2 PG girls hostels. There is a huge auditorium with a capacity of more than 750 seats and have a facility of Wi-Fi along with it. A huge Dr BN Sharma Library is available here. A personal reading room (PRR) is also available where students can read ...

reviews.review_heading: It's the best college to study MBBS in Rajasthan. I'm highly satisfied to be a part of this college.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available on our campus. Our college provides us with a very peaceful environment for a better study. There are laboratories for each subject, and the hospital attached is also very good. The infrastructure of our college is very good. There are canteens in the hostel also. Facilities of our college and hostel are very satisfying.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Girls hostel is really good because girls are some what more into cleaning. But boys hostels are pathetic and doors are broken windows are broken no proper facility of water supply. Unhygienic. Food is okay in mess. Not very good not very bad. Basketball ball is there, volleyball court and indoors. Swimming pool .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my admission to RNT Medical College; life in Udaipur is excellent.
reviews.review_text: In our college, Wi-Fi is available only in libraries, but our classrooms are well-developed with projectors. Labs are nicely equipped according to departments. However, in the medical college, hostels are not well-developed, and cleanliness is a concern. There are 2–3 courts for sports activities.

highlights.summary: Uttaranchal University admissions 2026 are open for Diploma, UG, PG, and PhD courses. Interested aspirants can check and apply for their desired courses through the official website of the university. A few more updates are as follows:

table.details: NIRF 75 in Pharmacy category, NIRF 201-300 in Engineering category

college_info.intro:
Uttaranchal University Dehradun offers UG & PG level programmes in the fields like Engineering, Management, Law, Pharmacy etc. BTech, MBA & Pharmaceutical Programmes are popular courses among the students. It is has NIRF ranking of 75 in Pharmcy & 201-300 ranking in Engineering category. BTech is provided at the UG level with the duration of 4 years. It includes streams like Computer Science, Aerospace, Artificial Intelligence,etc. After successful completion of the programme, students can explore their career as Software Developers, Computer Engineers, Data Analyst, Systems Analysts, IT Consultants, etc.
Pharmaceutical Programmes are provided at both Ug & PG level. BPharma is offered at the UG level, while MPharma at the PG level. The career prospect for these courses include roles like Pharmacist, Production and Quality Manager, etc. Apart from this, the university also offers a 2-year MBA programme at the PG level. MBA programme includes industry interactions, group presentations, field projects, case study analysis, and company visits to develop the practical skills of the students. Students can check the courses given by Uttaranchal University Dehradun below:

review_summary.college_name: Uttaranchal University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is excellent as it helps us achieve our dreams.

content.Placements: Students are placed in various companies such as Wipro, Deloitte, HCL, Tech Mahindra, TCS, and many more. The highest package is 1.24 crores, the lowest package is 2.4 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. About 55% of students get internships at companies like Codetech and Wipro. The top roles offered in my course are web developer, app developer, and cybersecurity.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in classrooms and laboratories, including lab assistants, good Wi-Fi, and a neat and clean environment. The campus is very clean. In the hostel, all basic facilities are provided, such as a table, an almirah, a shoe rack, a chair, a fan, a water cooler, and a geyser. The food quality in the mess is good, but sometimes it is not that good. Medical facilities are available 24/7 as there is a hospital on the campus. Sports are held 2–3 times a year.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure, but the fees are a little bit on the higher side, education is good.

content.Placements: If you work beyond average, you can get a package. The average 4 to 5 LPA you can expect. Many companies visit the college. Mainly, job offers are on the marketing side. The highest package they claim in BBA is 10 LPA, and the average is 4 to 5 LPA. 70 to 80 per cent of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is on top-notch, no compromises with this. All facilities are available, like Wi-Fi campus, green campus, each library for each department, canteen food is at a reasonable price, sports available, games available in the hostel, and Wi-Fi speed is a little slow.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good nature vibes, infrastructure is old but it's okay, cafeteria is crowded.

content.Placements: 1. It was around 80 students in 1st semester. 2. The highest package was around 6-7 LPA, the lowest was 2-2.5lpa, avg was around between 3-4 LPA. 3. Top recruiting company in BBA was Wipro, Accenture, Deloitte, TCS, IBM, HCL, Capgemini, Infosys, ITC, and HDFC Bank 4. Around 30?40% of BBA students get internships in companies 5. Top roles were marketing executive, hr manager, digital marketing specials.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities is good Wi-Fi works sometimes nicely but most times not good, we have computer labs, classrooms are quite good, and library is also good. Hostel Facilities are good as I have home here but I know from friend, mess also good sports are also held.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. with ACCA Certification Course - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college.

content.Placements: Many students get placed in my course, so I cannot say the exact number. The highest package offered, as per my knowledge, is 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are HSBC, Amazon, Infosys, Citibank, Deloitte, KPMG, and EY. 60 percent of students get internships from my course. Roles like financial analyst, auditor, and global chartered accountant are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Network stability is too low. I give it 2 stars. Labs are clean and very peaceful. Classrooms are well-maintained and comfortable. The library has many collections of books, and we can take books from there according to our mindset. I do not stay in the hostel, so I do not know about it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and strong IT learning experience with decent placements

content.Placements: 80 percent of students were placed. The highest packages are up to 150 LPA (international) and 60 LPA (domestic), with the average package around 5–6 LPA, and the lowest around 2.5–3.5 LPA per holder. Top recruiting companies are Microsoft, Google, Adobe, Amazon, Wipro, Deloitte, TCS, Capgemini, and Infosys. About 30 percent of students reported internships in companies like Google, Zscaler, Hike, IBM, and Amazon.
content.Infrastructure: The university offers good facilities for the B.Sc. IT department, including high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and a resourceful central library. Hostels are clean, secure, and provide Wi-Fi, 24/7 electricity, and common rooms. The mess and canteen food are hygienic and decent, with multiple options. Medical needs are handled through an on-campus health centre with first-aid and ambulance availability. The campus also has indoor and outdoor sports facilities, including grounds, courts, and recreation areas. Overall, the infrastructure is well-maintained and student-friendly.

admission_overview.college_name: Uttaranchal University Admissions 2025: Application, Dates, Courses, Eligibility

admission_overview.title: Uttaranchal University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Uttaranchal University admission 2025 is both entrance and merit-based. The university offers a wide range of courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. Uttaranchal University accepts relevant entrance exam scores to shortlist candidates for admission. For instance, admission to the BTech course is done based on the rank secured in JEE Main and for MBA, Uttaranchal University accepts MAT/ CAT /CMAT / XAT/ UU Entrance Test scores. Further, merit in the last qualifying exam is also considered for admission to courses, such as BA. Uttaranchal University courses are offered through its various constituent schools and institutes. The courses are offered in various areas of study such as Management, Engineering, Law, etc. Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the eligibility criteria, courses, and admission procedure of the university.

eligibility_selection.title: Uttaranchal University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Uttaranchal University course admission is entrance-based for most of the offered programmes and is done based on preset admission criteria. Students looking to enrol into any of the offered courses need to meet the general eligibility requirements along with the selection criteria for admission. The university conducts its own entrance test in addition to accepting valid scores obtained in national-level entrance exams, such as MAT/ CAT/ XAT, CMAT, JEE Mains, etc.

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for reserved categories)
courses_table.selection_criteria: MAT/ CAT /CMAT / XAT/ UU Entrance Test Score/Percentile + Interview

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 in PCM/ PCB/ Agriculture or equivalent from a recognised board
BSc in relevant specialisation with a minimum of 50% marks (45% for reserved categories)
Class 12 in PCM with a minimum of 60% marks(55% for reserved categories)
courses_table.selection_criteria: JEE Main/ All National Aptitude Tests/ Qualifying Examination + PI

faqs.answer: You may get into the univeristy with 60% in Class 12, however, this depends on several factors. Uttaranchal University UG admissions require students to pass Class 12 in a relevant stream and with specified aggregate. The aggregate usually ranges from 42% to 50% (based on the course and category). Hence, yes,  60% is certainly enough to clear that criteria. However, as admission to certain courses, such as BTech are done on an entrance basis, students need to provide scores obtained in the accepted exam to be eligible for admission. Students may connect with the admission desk of the university to learn more about the admission chances of the university.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in Uttaranchal University with 60% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: Uttaranchal University selection criteria is both merit & entrance-based. The university accepts both national-level entrance exams in addition to conducting its own exam. Further, for certain courses, such as BTech, MSc, students are also required to appear for the PI rounds conducted by the university. faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for Uttaranchal University?

admission_process.title: Uttaranchal University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: TheUttaranchal University admission processstarts with the release ofUU application forms. Eligible candidates are required to fill out the application form before the deadline. The University shortlists candidates either based on merit secured in the qualifying exam or based on the performance of candidates in the entrance exam. All the applicants must appear for the personal interview round. Interested students can check out theUttaranchal University admission processfrom below:

Theapplication processis conducted in bothonline & offline modes. To apply online candidates are required to visit the official website of the university & click on the apply now option to fill out the application form. Candidates can also visit theUttaranchal University campus& purchase the application form from the admission office.
Step 2:Selection Process

To shortlist candidates, Uttaranchal University accepts various national-level entrance examination scores like JEE Main, MAT, XAT, NEET etc. as per the stream of the programme. The university also shortlists candidatesbased on merit secured in the qualifying examinations.Students are also called in for personal interview as per the criteria of the desired programme.
Step 3: Final Admission

Shortlisted candidates will get an offer letter from the university. They need to pay the admission confirmation fee to accept the offer, post which, the students will receive the admission confirmation letter.
For more information aboutUttaranchal Universitycheck out the below video:

faqs.question: How can I get Admission in Uttaranchal University for BA LLB?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission in BA LLB at Uttarakhand University you need to pass the eligibility criteria i.e. Twelve years of School education with 45% aggregate. Also you need to appear for the qualifying exams CLAT, CUET, ULET. For more details related to BA LLB courseclick here.

faqs.question: Which exam is required for BSc at Uttaranchal University?
faqs.answer: For BSc programme Uttaranchal University accepts theNational Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET).Therefore, it is mandatory for candidates to appear for the NEET exam. Candidates must apply for the NEET exam and fill out theNEET application form.However, the entrance exam is only required for BSc Medical courses. Apart from the medical courses, admission to BSc is based on candidates' performance in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BA in Uttaranchal University?
faqs.answer: Uttaranchal University BA fee is range from INR 45,000 - INR 3 lakh . The fee might include multiple components which must be paid at the time of admission. Apart from the tuition fee, there is a one-time admission fee of amount INR 10,000 , and a hostel fee of amount INR 2.57 lakh that students are required to pay in addition to the tuition fee. To get admitted to Uttaranchal University BA in English course, applicants must meet the eligibility criteria. Eligibility Criteria: Class 12 with 45% aggregate from any recognised board (40% aggregate for SC/ST category) Selection Criteria: Merit Based

hostel_campus.college_name: Uttaranchal University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel of Uttaranchal University has a provision for the single room, double room, three bed and four-bedroom. Each room is furnished with bed/beds, mattress, study table, chair, cupboard and curtains. 4000 boys and girls can accommodate in the campus hostel. There are spacious lawns within the hostel campus for the students to play different games or to take walk or recreate themselves. Great care is taken to maintain hygienic conditions and cleanliness. Hostel common rooms are fully equipped with HD TV network, indoor games, newspapers and laundry staff. There is a separate group of hostel maintenance staff under the active supervision of the Chief Warden. The hostel offers many exciting experiences both in the terms of games and entertainment.

library.description: The Uttaranchal University’s library holds a hybrid collection of 125000 books, 125 current periodicals, 1000 back volumes, 15 National newspapers, 1000+ e-journals and e-books of National / International societies  500+ dissertations and over 2500 CDs/DVDs.  The bibliographical details and content pages for all the books are accessible through OPAC. The Library has a collection of approximately 3500 clippings concerning to topics relevant to the academic community of the University. The Library has a multimedia section to access NPTEL video lectures on various subjects and topics.

cafeteria.description: The University has set up an open-air joint ‘Nescafe’ which provides the delicious muffins, sandwiches, different flavours of coffee, soft drinks and the piping hot snacks. No-effort is spared to offer the best of the food. It has a comfortable seating arrangement and provides respite to the students after their gruelling academic schedule.

reviews.review_heading: It is excellent as it helps us achieve our dreams.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in classrooms and laboratories, including lab assistants, good Wi-Fi, and a neat and clean environment. The campus is very clean. In the hostel, all basic facilities are provided, such as a table, an almirah, a shoe rack, a chair, a fan, a water cooler, and a geyser. The food quality in the mess is good, but sometimes it is not that good. Medical facilities are available 24/7 as there is a hospital on the campus. Sports are held 2–3 times a year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Uttaranchal Institute of Management, Uttaranchal UniversityReviewed on 23 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, but the fees are a little bit on the higher side, education is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is on top-notch, no compromises with this. All facilities are available, like Wi-Fi campus, green campus, each library for each department, canteen food is at a reasonable price, sports available, games available in the hostel, and Wi-Fi speed is a little slow.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Uttaranchal Institute of Management, Uttaranchal UniversityReviewed on 15 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good nature vibes, infrastructure is old but it's okay, cafeteria is crowded.
reviews.review_text: Facilities is good Wi-Fi works sometimes nicely but most times not good, we have computer labs, classrooms are quite good, and library is also good. Hostel Facilities are good as I have home here but I know from friend, mess also good sports are also held.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Network stability is too low. I give it 2 stars. Labs are clean and very peaceful. Classrooms are well-maintained and comfortable. The library has many collections of books, and we can take books from there according to our mindset. I do not stay in the hostel, so I do not know about it.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and strong IT learning experience with decent placements
reviews.review_text: The university offers good facilities for the B.Sc. IT department, including high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and a resourceful central library. Hostels are clean, secure, and provide Wi-Fi, 24/7 electricity, and common rooms. The mess and canteen food are hygienic and decent, with multiple options. Medical needs are handled through an on-campus health centre with first-aid and ambulance availability. The campus also has indoor and outdoor sports facilities, inclu...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Uttaranchal Institute of Management, Uttaranchal UniversityReviewed on 3 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good. I like this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and library are available. Classrooms are also good, they are clean. But there is network issue. The phone's network didn't come, so we can't use the net properly. Wi-Fi network also doesn't work properly. Library is good, and so many books available in the library. Food is not that' much good.

reviews.review_heading: UIT, B.Tech course in specialization of AI and ML.
reviews.review_text: The college has given all the required facilities to the student, so that they don't have to go out of campus for getting something. The marketplace is also provided in college area. The medical facilities are also up to the mark in case of any emergency happens to students.

reviews.review_heading: B.Tech course at Uttarachal University.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is properly made with well-maintained classrooms having proper ventilation. The classroom size is around 80 students. Hostel facilities are decent, with rooms having furniture. There is proper security with an allotted warden for each hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Uttaranchal Institute of Management, Uttaranchal UniversityReviewed on 18 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Uit BCA course Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: There are always many complaints regarding the hostel facilities, which are also not being properly taken care of by the college itself. Food is very degraded and not prepared hygienically. Most of the students prefer to take flats outside the college premises to avoid such conditions.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Uttaranchal Institute of Management, Uttaranchal UniversityReviewed on 16 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: BCA course in UIT- USCS Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is maintained properly, along with which proper cleaning takes place every day. The class size for one batch of BCA is around 76 students. Wi-Fi facilities are not good on campus, and in the hostel, asking for Wi-Fi facilities is way too costly.

reviews.review_heading: Good hostel & events, average academics, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is value for money, and the food in the mess is quite good. Breakfast, lunch, and snacks are well prepared, though dinner could be better. Canteen food is average. Wi-Fi is available 24/7, but in some areas, the connectivity is not very stable. Medical facilities are provided, and in the evening, students enjoy playing cricket and football on the ground. The only drawback of the hostel is that the warden tends to be too strict. All the academic buildings are equipped with well maintai...

reviews.review_heading: UIT College, Dehradun for the course B.Teach.
reviews.review_text: I like the college campus very much as it is so huge, surrounded by so much land with all the facilities. There are many cafeterias or food courts in the college itself. There are many sports and game facilities in the college for the students who are very fond of sports. Other than this, the college also conducts many seminars or functions at least once in two weeks to gain engagement among students.

reviews.review_heading: University for B.Tech AI/Ml.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is highly admirable and well-maintained with proper cleanliness and all the facilities required by the students. Most of the facilities are provided by the college in the tuition and hostel fees themselves. There are no additional charges for them. Other than this, there are sports facilities through which you can play lots of games in inter-college competitions.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Uttaranchal Institute of Management, Uttaranchal UniversityReviewed on 29 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and all the necessary facilities are available in this college.
reviews.review_text: I am very much like the infrastructure of this college. Additionally, the college provides all necessary facilities, including free Wi-Fi. Furthermore, the classrooms are spacious. Our college has three to four sports grounds, as well as a library area where you can borrow books for your course.

reviews.review_heading: For B.Tech, it is the best preference.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and the department buildings are very good and spacious. The college also has many built-in facilities, such as a library for each course, Wi-Fi, which is available all the time. In addition to this, the college also has its own temple. The seniors of the college are also very helpful and nice.

college_info.college_name: Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Rohini: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Rohini Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

table.details: Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research Indian Medical Association

college_info.intro:
Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Rohini offers a wide range of programmes at the UG, Diploma, and Certificate levels. The flagship programmes offered at MIAPE include BSc. The college offers this programme across several specialisations such as BSc in Medical Radiology Imaging Technology, BSc in Operation Theatre Technology, BSc in Cardiovascular Technology (Cath Lab), etc.
Admission to the majority of courses requires candidates to qualify Class 12 with PCB/ PCM with an age limit of 17 years. The duration of the BSc is 3 years, with 2 years of theory and 1 year of internship. The fee structure of BSc includes tuition fees ranging from INR 3.8 Lakh to INR 3.95 Lakh. Candidates can check the Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Rohini popular programmes in the table given below:

placements.overview: Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Rohini placement 2024 details are not out yet. It will be updated once it is released. The college provides several opportunities to students for industry exposure, internships, and placement assistance by the dedicated Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Rohini placement team. Further, the college provides assistance to students in resume building, interview preparation, and job search strategies. Further, the placement assistance involves various steps such as Pre-placement session, Mock interviews, Evaluation -placement perspective, and Final placement offer.

faqs.answer: A:    Max Institute of Allied and Paramedical Education offers median package range of (approx) INR 200,000 during on-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance program as well. Additionally, it has been rated 4.5 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.
faqs.question: How much placements salary students get after studying at Max Institute of Allied and Paramedical Education?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Rohini courses are offered to students at UG, Diploma, Certificate, etc. levels. MIAPE offers courses such as BSc, BVoc, Diploma and Certificate on the basis of merit. The college offers a BSc Programme across several specialisations, such as BSc in Medical Radiology Imaging Technology, BSc in Medical Laboratory Technology, etc. The duration of the BSc programme at the UG level is 3 years and includes a comprehensive curriculum. In addition to this, the college also offers a wide range of certificate and diploma-level programmes. Some of the specialisations offered in certificate programmes are CT/MRI, Ultrasound Technician, TPA & Insurance, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Max Institute of Allied and Paramedical Education, Saket requires 40% aggregate in Class 12 with PCM/PCB and 50% aggregate for another stream. So to be eligible for admission, applicants are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria before applying online to get admission.

A Drug Regulator, also known as a Regulatory Affairs Professional, is an individual who is responsible for ensuring that pharmaceutical products, medical devices, and related healthcare products comply with regulatory requirements and standards set by government agencies and regulatory bodies.

content.Placements: As 76% of students were placed in 2023 placements. Most of the recruiters were reputed hospitals in Chennai actively involved in the hiring process of our students. 70% of students got internship opportunities through the college; usually, it was based on academic performance.

content.Placements: Nearly 70% of students got placed in companies. Around 50% of students have a chance to grab internship opportunities. All our alumni got placed in top-reputed hospitals with the highest salary packages. The highest salary package offered is 17.4 LPA by a reputed hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Nearly 1,000 students keep on graduating from our college every year. It's a crowded campus with healthy conditions. Apart from studies, we are supported to play sports during a free period. Everyday rooms are sanitized with a properly maintained campus.

content.Placements: We were asked to do internships,as based on our work skills and experience, we were easily placed in various medicals and hospitals. Also, based on our performance, they recommended that we get jobs abroad. On the other hand, based on our academic performance, they arranged scholarships to do a master’s abroad.
content.Infrastructure: Higher rated college for doing pharmacy in the region of Coimbatore. Libraries were located at blocks of every discipline. Also, regular periodicals,journals, and newspapers were present within the library. Also, our management distributes daily newspapers to us to update us on the day-to-day news.
