admission_process.title: KMCH College of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KMCH College of Pharmacy admission 2025(registration window) is currently open. The college offers courses, such as BPharma, MPharma, etc., at the UG and PG level. KMCH College of Pharmacy is affiliated withThe Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R. Medical University, Chennai. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the college also offers doctorate and diploma courses. To be admitted to KMCH College of Pharmacy, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college offers a total of six courses in the stream of Pharmacy. The application process atKMCH College of Pharmacyis conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutKMCH College of Pharmacy course admission 2025.

The mode of study at KMCHCP courses is full-time. To enrol for course admissions, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the college. Read on to know more aboutKMCH College of Pharmacy course admissions 2025.

KMCH College of Pharmacy courses’ admissions are based on merit basis. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection of allKMCH College of Pharmacy courses:

Note:The candidate who passed a UG Degree course other than the Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R Medical University, Chennai has to obtain an eligibility certificate from Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R Medical University, Chennai.
KMCH College of Pharmacy admission process includes registration and merit preparation list. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in KMCH College of Pharmacy:
STEP 1: KMCH College of Pharmacy Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on Merit-based. However, aspirants have to meet the last educational qualification set by the college.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: Is MPharma course available at KMCH College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: Yes, MPharma course is available at theKMCH College of Pharmacy. The college offers a two-year MPharma course at the PG level. The institute offers MPhrama through the The Tamil Nadu Dr MGR Medical University. To be eligible for the award of the degree the candidate shall complete the course in a maximum period of two years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass graduation (common eligibility) to apply for the MPharma course.

faqs.question: Can I apply for KMCH College of Pharmacy MPharma course after graduation?
faqs.answer: Yes, aspirants who have completed BPharma with a 55% aggregate are eligible to apply for theKMCH College of PharmacyMPhrama programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at later stages of admission. Besides, candidates must qualify for the selection process for admission based on performance. Selection will be based on merit.

college_info.intro:
JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida popular programmes are BTech and MCA. It offers variety of courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. The top recruiters of JSS Academy of Technical Education in the recent past include Amazon, Accenture, Google, HCL, IBM, Infosys, Samsung, etc. The JSS Noida has been ranked 201-300 by the NIRF 2025 under the category Engineering. Students can become software engineers, IT professionals, data scientists & technical consultants or can take up various job opportunities relevant to their field. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Joining JSS Academy of Technical Education, Noida for BTech course is generally considered a decent option. Candidates must consider factors like infrastructure, faculty experience, hostel and mess facilities, curriculum, etc. while taking admission.
The academy offers these courses in the streams of Engineering, Computer Applications, and Management. JSS Noida also gives hostel facilities to students. Hence, students can study in the institute without any difficulties.

review_summary.college_name: JSS Academy of Technical Education Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure with a green campus and decent hostels, supportive faculty.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is average. The highest package offered in CSE core is 45 to 50 LPA and the lowest package offered is 4 to 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, IBM, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Samsung, and Amazon. The internship ratio is 100 percent but it depends on students skills and interests.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are like a green campus and decent hostel including Wi-Fi, a classroom with projectors and a library. The quality of hostel food is moderate not too bad contains four meals and hostels also have medical support 24/7, including outdoor and indoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Hoping for a better placement rate in JSS, good infrastructure, and focus on skills.

content.Placements: I recently enrolled in this college, and as I have heard before, 2022, its placement was so good, even in 2020, the highest package was 60 LPA at Google. But as of now, the placement condition is too bad. Big companies are not coming to recruit, the average is only 4 LPA-6 LPA. But I am hoping that in the Next 3-4 years, the placement ratio will improve, and even big companies can also recruit.
content.Infrastructure: For infrastructure, I would say neither is too good like IIT, NIT, IIMs infra, nor too bad like other tier-2 colleges. Hostel infrastructure is better both for boys and girls. Even though the capacity is low and the buildings are old, it is a better place for B.Tech students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering(Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Harsh reality of JSSATE Noida.

content.Placements: Around 20 to 30 percent of students are placed. As of now, the highest package is around 15 LPA and the lowest around 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Accenture, Wipro, Deloitte, etc. There is no exact information about how many got internships from the course, but I guess very few, around 5 to 6, will be able to get paid internships, otherwise, most of them got unpaid internships.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are not well equipped like a typical government college. Hostels are decent; you will get both AC and non-AC rooms. Mess food is very bad, but I prefer the college hostel at least in the first year. This college is not for you if you love sports and games, no proper facilities are there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, good placement and infrastructure.

content.Placements: The placement record in college is 87 percent of students gets placed in 2024-25. The highest package is 48 LPA and lowest package is 4 LPA, and the median package is 6 LPA-8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys and Wipro. Top roles offered by companies are data development and software development.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is overall good. The labs are well. The library has AC, with good environment for studying. The hostel facility is okay. The bathrooms are not well furnished and mostly have construction issues. The food quality is okay, like other mess. The hygiene is properly maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is good if you can work hard, it can bring you a good amount of opportunities.

content.Placements: Placements are average, not very good, but you can get enough opportunities if you can skill up yourself. According to the college placement cell, the recent batch has the highest package offer, which is 21 LPA, and the average package is approximately 6.5 LPA, which is quite average. But you can get opportunities to grab.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are above average. The infrastructure for CSE depth of 1st year is not good since there are no AC in classrooms, but some labs are air-conditioned. Wi-Fi speed is average, not up to the mark. The hostel is good, and the mess food is edible till now. The library is top class with good infrastructure, fully air-conditioned, and a wide range of books and newspapers are available.

admission_process.title: JSS Academy of Technical Education, Noida Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: JSS Academy of Technical Education, Noida,offers admission to candidates in various courses. The admission process is conducted both online and offline. Candidates must register themselves with the academy by filling out the application form. Further, are required to appear for an entrance exam, for their preferred course. Below is a detailed breakdown ofJSS Academy of Technical Education Noida admission process:
JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida Registration Process

Candidates must register themselves with the institute in order to apply for admission. This is the first step in the admission process. Application forms for all the courses are available online on the institute’s official website. If a candidate wants to apply offline, they can contact the admission office. The application form must be filled out carefully by the candidate before the last date.
JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida Selection Criteria

After or before successfully registering with the institute, the candidates are required to appear for an entrance exam. The entrance exams accepted by JSS Noida include- JEE Mains, and CUET, etc. Candidates must score the required aggregate and appear for the counselling process to take admission.
Counselling Process
Once the exams have been conducted, results are declared. Students must appear for counselling, depending on the chosen course.
Admission call and confirmation of seat
If students clear all the criteria, they are selected and informed. Students must report to the college with fees and required documents. To confirm the seat, candidates must pay theJSS Noida fees.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Tech at JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida?
faqs.answer: The admission for B.Tech in JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida has the following procedures. The candidate should have appeared for an entrance exam, JEE Main/ UPCET which is conducted annually for admission into JSS. Then he has to get a valid score and participate in UPTAC counseling for seat allotment before the rank, category, and branch preference (e.g. - 180 seats under Computer Science). Eligibility in this context means there should be at least 45% marks through valid 10+2 in Physics, Mathematics and Chemistry (40% in case of reserved categories). However, there is also an option for direct admission through management quota depending on availability and higher fee structure.

faqs.question: What all courses are offered by JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida?
faqs.answer: JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida, enjoys the privilege of a large variety of courses offered. Postgraduate programs include MTech in Manufacturing Systems, MCA, and MBA. Aspiring researchers may also consider PhD programs offered.These fields cover universities in engineering, IT, management, and pharmaceutical sciences, which means they have various career prospects. Although offered by the institute, the courses relating to AKTU guarantee that a cohesive curriculum is attached to the different disciplines making it a diverse and flexible center of education.

faqs.question: Can I get into JSS Noida with 70% in class 12 via JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, with 70% in JEE Main, you can get into JSS Noida. Candidates must score 70% or more marks in the aggregate of the best of five subjects, including Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics, and have a JEE Main Rank (Paper – 1) to be eligible for admission to JSS Noida. Additionally, there are relaxations in minimum marks requirements for different categories like OBC-NCL, SC, ST, differently-abled persons, and defense candidates.

faqs.answer: JSS Academy of Technical Education, JSS Mahavidyapeetha, Noida has been rated 3.2 on placements on the basis of 544 reviews done by students. In JSS Academy of Technical Education, JSS Mahavidyapeetha, Noida, 855 students were admitted in year 2015-16, out of which 961 graduated in 2018-19. From this, 505 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 300000 and 123 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2016-17, 914 students were admitted, out of which 981 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 606 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 353000 and 143 students got selected for higher studies. In JSS Academy of Technical Education, JSS Mahavidyapeetha, Noida, 1007 students were admitted in year 2017-18, out of which 1014 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 629 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 421000 and 156 students got selected for higher studies.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at JSS Academy of Technical Education?
faqs.answer: As per Shiksha verified reviews, JSS Academy of Technical Education has an impressive review rating of 3.24 by 551 students.

faqs.question: Does JSS Academy of Technical Education have good placements?
faqs.answer: JSS Academy of Technical Education (JSSATE) has a decent record when it comes to placements. Around 60 to 70% of students are able to get placed. The average package offered stays between INR 8 and 10 LPA. There have been instances where the number of placements was affected by factors like a recession. Some reviews mention that all eligible students get placed, but there were challenges in certain years due to economic conditions. However, the college has seen students being recruited by top companies like Accenture, IBM, Mercedes-Benz, Infosys, and others, with some students securing high packages. Overall, while there may have been fluctuations in placement numbers, JSS Academy of Technical Education does offer opportunities for placements in reputed companies.

hostel.description: Separate hostel facility is available for both boys and girls. Rooms are spacious, clean, airy and well maintained with common bathrooms and are available on multi-sharing basis. Each room is provided with beds, wardrobes, study tables and chairs. Round-the-clock power back-up facility is available. Spacious dining rooms are also available.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis, Volley Ball

hostel.description: Separate hostel facility is available for both boys and girls. Rooms are spacious, clean, airy and well maintained with common bathrooms and are available on multi-sharing basis. Each room is provided with beds, wardrobes, study tables and chairs. Round-the-clock power back-up facility is available. Spacious dining rooms are also available.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis, Volley Ball

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with a green campus and decent hostels, supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are like a green campus and decent hostel including Wi-Fi, a classroom with projectors and a library. The quality of hostel food is moderate not too bad contains four meals and hostels also have medical support 24/7, including outdoor and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Hoping for a better placement rate in JSS, good infrastructure, and focus on skills.
reviews.review_text: For infrastructure, I would say neither is too good like IIT, NIT, IIMs infra, nor too bad like other tier-2 colleges. Hostel infrastructure is better both for boys and girls. Even though the capacity is low and the buildings are old, it is a better place for B.Tech students.

reviews.review_heading: Harsh reality of JSSATE Noida.
reviews.review_text: Labs are not well equipped like a typical government college. Hostels are decent; you will get both AC and non-AC rooms. Mess food is very bad, but I prefer the college hostel at least in the first year. This college is not for you if you love sports and games, no proper facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, good placement and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is overall good. The labs are well. The library has AC, with good environment for studying. The hostel facility is okay. The bathrooms are not well furnished and mostly have construction issues. The food quality is okay, like other mess. The hygiene is properly maintained.

reviews.review_heading: College is good if you can work hard, it can bring you a good amount of opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are above average. The infrastructure for CSE depth of 1st year is not good since there are no AC in classrooms, but some labs are air-conditioned. Wi-Fi speed is average, not up to the mark. The hostel is good, and the mess food is edible till now. The library is top class with good infrastructure, fully air-conditioned, and a wide range of books and newspapers are available.

reviews.review_heading: Ample facilities but infrastructure from inside is much desired.
reviews.review_text: From outside, it looks good, but inside, classes are a little shabby, and roads are well paved, with an abundance of parking spaces. You also get Wi-Fi for all students, great library access, and well-built labs. There are hostels with AC and without AC. The choice is yours and also depends on availability.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, facilities, teachers, and everything.
reviews.review_text: Very good facilities of Wi-Fi, library, classrooms, and labs are available. There are the best hostels ever, with bigger rooms, Wi-Fi connection, and good food. They have 3 shared rooms and a single room, and have AC and non-AC rooms. They provide vegetarian food and snacks. They have a water cooler and a filter also.

reviews.review_heading: A complete review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is what makes it stand above the rest. It has top-notch hostel facilities and good and spacious classrooms. The infrastructure stands at the top of the list. In our hostels, we have both AC hostel (ISH) and non-AC hostel (BH). Both the hostels have quality rooms.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: On campus, hostels are available, including both air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned options. Veg foods are served in the mess, while non-veg foods are not on the menu. Sports facilities are also available on campus, providing great opportunities.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with a good location advantage.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms do not have ACs or even smart boards. Teachers are using old-style blackboards The labs are fine and you can get Wi-Fi access for your laptop. The hostels are good with all the facilities, the mess food is also eatable and on some days, it could be great too.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JSS Academy of Technical Education.
reviews.review_text: There is a separate building for every course or department. Every department has its own library, labs, Wi-Fi, halls, and many classrooms. Hostel is good because you have a choice of rooms. You can choose a deluxe hostel room or a simple hostel room. But the food is average. There are many sports. You can play in your hostel as well as in college.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good and no disappointments.
reviews.review_text: There are very nice infrastructure in the college and good libraries are present where we get the articles to read nice books for pharmacy are provided. Sports events are done per year. The food canteen is very good with good hostel facilities and good mess food.

reviews.review_heading: College is overall good if you are a brilliant, but not for below-average students
reviews.review_text: Everything was good, but classrooms are not fully equipped as AC is not provided by the college. The library is good, and there is a motivating environment for study. Sports and canteen facilities are available, but medical facilities are not. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there is an auditorium and transport services available.

reviews.review_heading: JSS’s honest truth with all its upsides and downsides, so don’t miss it.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms aren’t air-conditioned and are really suffocating in the summer. But the library is fully air-conditioned and Wi-Fi is okay. The girls’ hostel is really good; it has both AC and non-AC rooms, the food is good and hygienic, and there are sports facilities. The labs have AC and are well-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: JSS, Noida is still relevant in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is below average and quality degrades in night food. Hostel life is good, with sufficient campus area for any sports. There are school-like classrooms with no AC and coolers, classes become bad in the summers, and decent infrastructure still needs improvement.

Hostels feature furnished, triple sharing AC/non AC rooms,  24/7 power backup, security, Wi-Fi, and mess services serving average rated food.

likes.text: Many companies recruit in our college some of them are Kronos, Adobe, TCS, Infosys, Extramarks, Byjus, Wipro, Exl, HCL, and many more.
Though the placement was good, many students were not satisfied with the selection criteria of the company as many companies preferred only those students, who have special skills.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

review_content.Placements: As MBBS student, you don't get any placements, but you get a lifetime security of being a doctor, being able to help others, and saving lives, and that's the a biggest achievement than any placements. So, placements don't matter, but self-satisfaction is a must, and that you achieve from MBBS.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have everything in our college, including all practical labs and a simulation lab, which is not available in any other private medical college in Haryana. That's the best thing about this college: you get visual dissection and then practical dissection, which makes everything easier. The mess and gym are also here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A complete review of World College of Medical Sciences and Research.

review_content.Placements: MBBS is an UG course to become a doctor. Our college has 150 seats for IG courses and 52 seats for PG courses. It is located in Jhajjar, Delhi NCR, and its patient flow is above average, which is good according to its location. Our alumni are placed in government services, with some pursuing PG degrees.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good and it is developing day by day, which is a good point for any college. Our hostels are great in comparison to other colleges; they are double-seaters, have separate washrooms for each room, and are spacious enough .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Really good facilities are there.

review_content.Placements: The academics of the college are quite appreciable. The facilities they provide are up to par. You will leave with a wealth of knowledge and the most valuable experience. The faculty is supportive. You will learn many new things here. You will have a greater experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities at hostel are much appreciated. The quality of the food is the best. Medical facilities are also available to students for free 24/7. Grounds are available. Hostels are clean. Light and water facilities are up to par. Overall, it is good.

reviews_list.review_title: It provides an Ayurvedic course which deals with obstetrics and gynecology.

review_content.Placements: The highest possibility of students getting placed in various top hospitals and clinics. Also, chances for getting job opportunities in government hospitals are also arranged by the college. The very least package provided to students of our college is 5 LPA.
review_content.Faculty: Lectures focus on giving practical knowledge rather than explaining it theoretically. We are able to get deep and instant knowledge about the internal problems of the patients and immediate solutions for such problems. Additionally, guest lectures are also available to give extra clearance about subjects. The college provides various UG and PG courses in the specialisation of Ayurveda. Nowadays, students are more interested in Ayurvedic courses which shows in the results of academic admissions. For providing additional training, all facilities and arrangements are made by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Well reputed ayurvedic medical college with good facilities.

review_content.Placements: The college has a total of 125 seats. As it is a government college, it offers an internship with a stipend of 18,000 INR. After the completion of a degree, one can opt to join a government or private hospital or can start his/her own clinic, getting a decent amount of salary, starting with 40K-60K INR, depending on the skills. After getting a seat into MD/MS, cracking the PG exam, the college offers 80K-85K per month; however, PG seats are quite few in the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are not so spacious, having accommodation for a batch of 125 students. Some parts of the college building are currently in the renovation stage. The college campus is not so big. The campus has a herbal garden, a badminton court, and a volleyball court. The library has all the course-related books and a reading hall available. CCRAS is present on our college campus. The boys hostel has fewer facilities with old rooms. The girls hostel has comparatively better amenities and security present. The mess facility is average with average quality of food.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Tier 1 Ayurvedic college with good clinical exposure.

review_content.Placements: Students in the medical college do a one-year internship here with an average stipend of Rs. 18,000 per month. The hospital records a great number of out-patient departments per day, which makes it known for its good clinical exposure. Companies like Dabur, Patanjali, etc., are top recruiting companies in this field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is not so big. It has a college building with boys' and girls' hostels, 2 canteens, and badminton and volleyball courts. The hostel is in bad condition. The classrooms are spacious for the admitted students to accommodate. Anatomy, physiology, and all other department labs have all the required things as per the curriculum and with a practical perspective. The library provides all the subjects and many of their respective authors' books as per the curriculum.

It also offers certificate, and postgraduate diploma courses in the discipline of Health Management. faqs.answer: A:    Approximately 90 students can do an MPH at IIHMR UNIVERSITY. The university is placed 11th among private universities in the Education World Ranking and is well-known for its proficiency in health management research. The program integrates IIHMR's knowledge of health management research in South Asia with the caliber of the Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health. The selection is done based on prescreening along with TOEFL/ IELTS and GRE/ MCAT/ LSAT/ GMAT scores.
faqs.question: How many students can do MPH at IIHMR University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, IIHMR University accepts CAT scores for admission into its MBA programmes. The applicants are expected to have a valid score from one of the following management aptitude tests: CAT, XAT, NMAT, MAT, CMAT, ATMA, GMAT, or IIHMRU-MAT. For the MBA in Pharmaceutical Management, GPAT scores are also accepted. Candidates who have not taken any of these exams can appear for IIHMRU-MAT, conducted by the university. The final IIHMR University selection includes academic performance, entrance test scores, group discussion and personal interview.
faqs.question: Does IIHMR University accept CAT for MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    The entrance exam scores accepted by IIHMR University for admission to MBA are: CAT/ XAT/MAT/NMAT/CMAT/ATMA/GPATA minimum 50 percentile/ qualifying score is required in any of the national-level entrance exams to take admission. Those who have less than the 50 percentile will be required to appear in IIHMR UMAT. Please check the Shiksha's college page for further details.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does IIHMR University accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can get an MPH at IIHMR University with 75 percent in Graduation. However, other than that there are a few more requirements for an MPH at IIHMR University :Candidate must have at least 24 months of experience related to healthCandidate must have English proficiency, which can be shown by previous degree, IELTS or TOEFLGRE, MCAT, LSAT, or GMAT are also used to demonstrate a candidate's verbal and quantitative skills. IIHMR University offers 3 specializations in MPH, candidates are advised to check the Shiksha College page for further details.

admission_overview.college_name: IIHMR University Admission 2025: Application, Process, Courses, Fees

admission_process.title: IIHMR Jaipur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IIHMR Jaipur admission 2025is open for various courses. The prestigious institution offering quality education and research in the Health Management, Pharma and Development sectors. It currently offers postgraduate and doctoral programmes, executive education, research, and consultancy in Healthcare and related fields. All the courses are offered by the university under its three schools and institutes. The mode of application is online. Admission to all the courses is entrance-based. Additionally,IIHMR Universityconducts IIHMRU-MAT for those who have not appeared for any of the national-level aptitude tests. The university also offers a range of scholarships to students based the merit.

TheIIHMR Jaipur eligibilityfor all the courses at IIHMR Jaipur is merit in the last qualifying examination. However, the selection of candidates is entrance-based. They should have secured a minimum of 50% aggregate in any of the national entrance exams acceptable by the university. Additionally, IIHMR University conducts IIHMRU-MAT for those who have not appeared for any of the national-level aptitude tests. The table below mentions the eligibility and selection ofIIHMR courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Bachelor’s degree with 50% aggregate
MAT/ CAT/ CMAT/ATMA/XAT/ GMAT/ IIHMR-U MAT +GD and PI
Bachelor’s/ Master’s/ PhD
Prescreening along withTOEFL/IELTSandGRE/MCAT/LSAT/ GMAT scores
Master’s degree with 55% aggregate
IRAT/UGC NET/CSIR NET/ SLET/ GATE / Teacher Research Fellowship/ M Phil
Read More:IIHMR Jaipur MBA Prospectus 2025

Candidates aspiring to apply for admission to the IIHMR Jaipur can fill out the application form online through its official website. Admissions remain open for all the programmes. However, the Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI) rounds. IIHMR Jaipur admission process is explained in brief below:
Step 1: IIHMR Jaipur Application Process 2025

Candidates who meet the MBA eligibility criteria can apply for admission to IIHMR. The IIHMR Jaipur application process is conducted online. Candidates can fill out and submit the admission form through the institute's official website. Applicants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000.
Step 2: IIHMR Jaipur Selection rounds 2025

The IIHMR University shortlists at the admission stage based on the scores secured by students in any of the national-level aptitude tests held like MAT, CAT, CMAT, ATMA, XAT, GMAT, IRAT, UGC NET, etc. However, if a student does not attempt the above entrance exams, the IIHMR University itself conducts its IIHMRU-MAT. Following shortlisting, the candidates shortlisted are called for rounds of GDPI.
Step 3: IIHMR Jaipur Final Admission offer
The final selection is made based on the performance of the candidate in the GDPI round. Selected candidates need to pay the admissionconfirmation feeto secure their admission.

eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, NMAT, ATMA, XAT, IIHMR-U MAT, CMAT, CAT, GPAT
courses_data.description: IIHMR Jaipur offers four MBA programmes in health management, namely Hospital and Health Management (HM), Pharmaceutical Management (PM), MBA Healthcare analytics and Development Management (DM). The duration of each course is two years.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for MBA programme at IIHMR Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Eligible candidates would have a selection process which comprises a group discussion (GD) followed by personal interview (PI). A selection on basis of scoring the following national entrance tests or their aggregate or IIHMR- MAT /CMAT; CAT / XAT/ NMAT, along with scoring marks from GD and PI are followed to decide for selection. During personal interviews, original documents need to be produced to authenticate it at the venue of interviews. A minimum 50 percentile in the entrance exam; otherwi

faqs.question: Does IIHMR University accept CAT for MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, IIHMR University accepts CAT scores for admission into its MBA programmes. The applicants are expected to have a valid score from one of the following management aptitude tests: CAT, XAT, NMAT, MAT, CMAT, ATMA, GMAT, or IIHMRU-MAT. For the MBA in Pharmaceutical Management, GPAT scores are also accepted. Candidates who have not taken any of these exams can appear for IIHMRU-MAT, conducted by the university. The final IIHMR University selection includes academic performance, entrance test sco

faqs.question: How is the final score calculated for MBA admission at IIHMR Jaipur?
faqs.answer: For IIHMR Jaipur MBA admission, the final score is calculated based on few components that include 35% weightage for the score in CAT, XAT, NMAT, MAT, CMAT, ATMA, GPAT, or IIHMR-U MAT; 30% for graduation marks; 15% for Group Discussion performance and 20% for the Personal Interview. The total score is 100, and the students need to get above the minimum percentile cut off in the entrance exam, or else they can go for the IIHMR-U MAT if the marks are less than 50 percentile.

faqs.question: What rank is necessary for the MBA course at IIHMR University?
faqs.answer:
The final selection of the candidate is based on his or her performance in the qualifying examination with proportional score in CAT, XAT, NMAT, MAT, CMAT, ATMA GMAT, IIHMR U MAT, the Group Discussion (GD), and Personal Interview (PI). GPAT score is accepted for admission to MBA Pharmaceutical Management. The weightage given is as follow -
- CAT / XAT / MAT/ IIHMR U MAT/ NMAT/ CMAT / GMAT/ GPAT 35
- graduation marks 30
- Group discussion 15
- Personal Interview 20

courses_data.name: IIHMR Jaipur MPH Admission 2025
courses_data.description: IIHMR Jaipur offers a full-time Master of Public Health (MPH) programme of two-year duration. It combines Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health's excellence in the education sector and IIHMR's Health Management and Research in Southeast Asia. Important details of the MPH programme are given in the table below: Feature Details Eligibility -Bachelor’s degree/ Master’s degree/ PhD in a relevant discipline -English proficiency at TOEFL/ IELTS level -Verbal skills through GRE/ MCAT/ LSAT/ GMAT -Work experience (full-time) of two years or more (waived off in case of Master’s degree & PhD) Selection Criteria Prescreening process along with validTOEFL/IELTSandGRE/MCAT/LSAT/ GMAT scores Disclaimer:In the absence of the seat intake on the official website, the information has been sourced from non-official websites. This programme focuses on developing students' competencies in the core areas of public health, which are listed in the table below: MPH- Study Areas Epidemiology Biostatistics Health Management and Functional Management Environmental Health Sciences Public Health Biology Social and Behavioral Sciences Public Policy Ethics

faqs.question: What documents are required for applying to the JHSPH-IIHMR MPH programme at IIHMR University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must submit a CV, personal statement, recommendation letters, English proficiency scores, and (optional) standardized test scores. For international applicants, foreign transcripts must be evaluated by WES or ECE and submitted through SOPHAS to meet IIHMR University’s application requirements.

faqs.question: Where can a candidate check IIHMR University cutoff 2023?
faqs.answer: Candidates searching for facts approximately IIHMR University cutoff for 2023 can check the respectable college internet site. The cutoff for IIHMR (Indian Institute of Health Management Research) is subject to version every year based on elements which includes the wide variety of applicants and their usual performance. For MBA admission at IIHMR University, applicants want no less than 50% marks of their bachelor's degree, and the unique cutoff for MBA Hospital

faqs.question: What is the admission process of IIHMR University?
faqs.answer: An online application form has to be filled up, along with submitting valid scores of CAT, XAT, NMAT, MAT, CMAT, ATMA, GMAT, GPAT, or IIHMRU-MAT for admission to IIHMR University. Candidates shortlisted for the process are invited for group discussions and personal interviews. Selection is based on the performance in academics, entrance test scores, GD, and PI. Admission finally gets confirmed once the document verification and payment of the fee are done.

faqs.question: How many students can do MPH at IIHMR University?
faqs.answer: Approximately 90 students can do an MPH at IIHMR UNIVERSITY. The university is placed 11th among private universities in the Education World Ranking and is well-known for its proficiency in health management research. The program integrates IIHMR's knowledge of health management research in South Asia with the caliber of the Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health. The selection is done based on prescreening along with TOEFL/ IELTS and GRE/ MCAT/ LSAT/ GMAT scores.

placement_data.title: IIHMR University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The University has released the highest package details for 2024, which stood at INR 35.60 LPA . The other placement data for MBA , MPH , and MHA courses are yet to be released. Earlier, more than 130 companies recruited the 2023 passing out batch. The highest domestic package and average package offered to the 2023 batch were INR 13.10 LPA and INR 7.20 LPA , respectively. The total count of students placed was 188 .

Apart from the above details, the highest stipend offered during the 2023 internships was INR 47,500 per month . The students have received opportunities in various sectors like Analytics, BFSI, Consultancy, FMCG, Public Health, Pharmaceuticals, etc. The list of prominent companies that were part of IIHMR University placements in recent years included Abbott, Accenture, Deloitte, Fortis, PwC, ZS Associates , and many others.

hostel_campus.college_name: IIHMR University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Provides accommodation facility in single, double and triple sharing option with facilities like wi-fi, recreation, 24 hours electricity, water and security, housekeeping, library excess, free transportation on the emergency ground, doctor facility and laundry etc.

library.description: The library is spacious, air-conditioned and well-equipped. It has a collection of 31500 books, subscription of 120 journals, over 130 periodicals and collection also includes CD-ROMs and databases from India and abroad like Health Plan, Popline, e-TALC etc. The library resources are focused on Health Management, Hospital Administration, Health Economics etc. The library also has DELNET (Developing Library Network) membership.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court

reviews.review_heading: It's a very good course to pursue!
Reviewing MBA in hospital and healthcare management.
reviews.review_text: Inter-college fest is held every year. Library has healthcare books, novels etc. available for the students. Course fees is 9.5 Lacs but they provide good quality of facilities, we have a Wi-Fi along with the classrooms having projectors and digital boards. In hostel, the university takes care of every student by providing all the facilities required. The canteen and mess’ food is of good quality, we have special meals every Sunday. Sports and games are played in the ground.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty members and staffs.
reviews.review_text: The library is good; it has loads of journals, books, novels, and you can read newspapers and magazines, providing an experienced Dr. Handerson's library. Classes are good, with nice seating arrangements and air conditioning, along with PowerPoint presentations. It has two auditoriums; one is the old auditorium, and one is new; both are great for different functions.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIHMR University, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: Due to the vast area covered by the college, the campus is too big. The infrastructure of the department is very good, with big classrooms and labs. There is a library in the college for the students, and Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus. The hostel rooms are also of good quality, and the food in the hostel is tasty. There are separate bathrooms for each room.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placement cell, and you can get great exposure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. The campus has lush greenery. The hostel facility is excellent. The quality of the food is good. Wi-Fi is available. The library is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: You may find the college is popular on the internet but reality is different.
reviews.review_text: College is popular for showoff and creating values on social media. You may find it popular on the internet but the reality is very different. Think twice, take suggestions of passed out students, before comping here. If you are going to do a programme, you might think that you will get a good placement. Think twice before you enroll in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. This university has all the facilities including Wi-Fi, laboratories, library, and has a very good environment. The hostel and the quality of food are average.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching curriculum and infrastructure won't disappoint you.
reviews.review_text: You will get all the facilities to do extraordinary things like Wi-Fi, Practical Labs, Clean Classrooms and Library with lots & lots of books. One of the most important thing is that IIHMR University, Jaipur is the cleanest university in India. Since we are taking up the classes online, therefore can't tell about medical facilities, mess and canteen or sports & games.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty- good. Placement- Average, it totally depends on your skills, .
reviews.review_text: Faculty members like to interact with students, the more you interact with them the more you benefited. All faculty members is Ph.D. holder and well experienced in pharma field. Excellent. Every thing is good even the food is also good, but it is human nature if you eat same food in a routine you start complaining about it.

reviews.review_heading: According to the good placement, infrastructure and facilities absolutely satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: In the college campus good connections of Wi-Fi, It department is helpful for the students and infrastructure are available for the course. I have enjoyed in the college campus. According to the infrastructure and the quality food in mess available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games are available for the enjoyment.

reviews.review_heading: Excellence infrastructure & resources, experienced faculties, and pioneer institute in healthcare.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms equipped with Wi-Fi, AC, Speakers, mike & sound system, projector, whiteboard, biometric attendance, and a computer connected to internet and projector. Computer labs with internet connectivity & printing facility, physical & digital library for students are available. Wi-Fi in full campus including hostel, single and double rooms are available with AC, free laundry service,  24*7 water and pre-paid electricity, attached mess and canteen facility. Food quality is good here, taste wish...

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIHMR University.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very beautiful and amazing. The walls of the college are made of stones. There is a peacock garden where peacocks can be seen during morning time. The college is spread in 14 acres. There are 14 classrooms, and the library has a good collection of books, journals, research papers etc.  The college has 3 computer labs with approximately 180 PCs. The food served in the mess fluctuates. Sometimes it's good and sometimes bad. The cafeteria has good delicious fast foods. A medical room ...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, along with good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi service, computer labs, classrooms, library, auditoriums are available in the college. The facilities provided in the hostel are satisfactory, along with the quality of mess food provided and other services. There is a medical room in the campus where one doctor sits 1-2 days a week in the evenings.

reviews.review_heading: I am extremely satisfied although, waiting for placement window.
reviews.review_text: In my university, there is free unlimited Wi-Fi, a library with online portal also available. Classrooms have projectors, white and blackboard. Mess food is available for hostlers and students who wish to eat food when hungry, but the taste is not like all other hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with all facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure gives you a feel of harvard. Hostel and food was good too. Library was amazing and complete blend of online and offline resources. Classrooms were amazing specially old auditorium. Beauty about shared network- we had a online shared folder where you could get collection of movies and online series.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about IIHMR University

likes.text: Organisations coming for the campus recruitment are from the hospital field, health-related NGOs, health-related consulting firms, health insurance companies, health-related start-ups and health-related government-based organisations.

likes.text: The IIHMR University has one of the beautiful campuses in India with a pleasant ambience.
Wi-Fi connection throughout the campus, a good library, and palatable goods in the canteen are some of the plus points.

likes.text: Course curriculum is good, well structured and study material is really good, its detailed and will help you all your life.
This course curriculum is very relevant since the health industry keeps on increasing its prospects, and there is a huge need for people who can manage these prospects effectively.

likes.text: You get amazing faculty members, a great learning environment, and students from all around the country, which is a great learning experience.
Classes are interactive in nature and are a healthy mix of formal lectures, case studies and presentations.

college_info.college_name: IIHMR University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: IIHMR Jaipur offers Shri P. D. Agarwal Scholarship as financial assistance to students. Scholarships are provided to MBA Hospital and Health Management, Pharmaceutical Management, Development Management, Healthcare Analytics, and various other course students. IIHMR Jaipur scholarships are provided based on the past academic records of students and their scores in entrance exams such as CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ NMAT/ ATMA, and others. Students must meet the eligibility criteria to avail of the benefits of one of the scholarships provided by IIHMR University.

Under the Shri P. D. Agarwal Scholarship, partial fee scholarships in the form of partial tuition fee waivers are provided to students. IIHMR University Jaipur also offers full-fee scholarships (100% tuition fee waiver) to students belonging to SC/ ST/ OBC- Non-Creamy layer/ EWS on combined merit. The below-mentioned are the Shri P. D. Agarwal Scholarship Types:
Scholarship Policy for students of MBA Hospital and Health Management admitted for the academic session 2024-2026

college_info.intro:
Guru Kashi University offers a large diversity of courses to students at its campus. Students can access UG programs, among which the popular courses include BBA, BEd, BVoc, among others. The Bachelor of Arts (BA) GKU course is available to students in a large collection of specializations.
Students can pursue higher education with PG programs like MBA (Agribusiness), MA, MTech, MEd, among others. Students seeking to pursue research and doctorate fields can choose from the various PhD programs at GKU Bathinda.

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    Placements are good, approximately 90% of students get placed. Top companies come and recruit the students. It is the top recruiting university. The highest package offered here was 7 LPA and Average package is around 2-3 LPA and good packages are offered. Roles such as marketing are offered in the agriculture course.
faqs.question: Is Guru Kashi University good for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Guru Kashi University does offer internships to MBA students. There are a number of documents and PdF on the university's official website that include information about the placement cell and internship opportunities given by the university. However, GKU Bathinda does not specify the duration of internships for MBA students.
faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University offers internships to MBA students?

review_summary.college_name: Guru Kashi University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best universities in Punjab to do the BCA course.

content.Placements: 70% of students in my course get selected. The highest package is 6.5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. The average package ranges from 3-3.5 LPA. Honda and Tech Mahindra are the top companies that visit the college to hire students from my course. 60% of students got internships from my course in the HDFC Bank. The top role offered is a manager.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in my department are excellent. It has a 24x7 Wi-Fi facility. There are many labs for different subjects. Classrooms are good. There is a huge library in which more than 500 students can study at one time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied by the mess food quality, roads, and the college life.

content.Placements: About 50 to 60% of students get placed in my course. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA, and the average is 3.50 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Wipro, Kent, Nestled, etc. About 70 to 80% of the students get internships. Top roles are AI ML, and web development.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Classrooms are also good, and Wi-Fi is available in hostel libraries. The hostel facilities is good, and the mess food quality is good in some hostels, and in some hostels it is bad. The sports tournament is held at our university every year. The canteen is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are more experienced and now there are new facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are not that enough. Around 2-3% of students got placements. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the minimum is 2 LPA. There are many companies like JU, Prabhat Seeds, etc. In this course, the top roles are to manage the agricultural field, pesticide distribution, safe use, and many banking jobs like assistant manager are there.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the course and the college are good as well. The labs and fields are there for better knowledge. Staff is also good but the new staff is just okay not that much good. Hostel looks good but I never lived in a hostel. The food of the hostel is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college.

content.Placements: It is a great university where many students secure placements after finishing their studies. Last year, many students achieved about 100 out of 30-40. So, it is a nice university you can check out if you want to pursue a degree or master’s in any field.
content.Infrastructure: It has many buildings and departments according to different fields, and each department is very well maintained. There are plenty of canteens around the departments for lunch, as well as a library, computer lab, etc. It also has a park.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best university in Punjab, and all faculty members are good.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed here. The highest package here is 10 LPA, and the lowest package ranges from 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and Amazon. Around 80% of students secure internships in companies like Microsoft, Deloitte, and startups.
content.Infrastructure: The department offers a well-equipped lab, Wi-Fi, best classroom, and a smart library with ample resources. Hostels have decent facilities including clean rooms, attached bathrooms, Wi-Fi, and study space. The mess food is average but hygienic. Medical facilities are available. Gym is also there.

admission_overview.college_name: Guru Kashi University Admission 2025: Process, Eligibility, Dates

admission_process.title: Guru Kashi University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Guru Kashi University has over 100 courses in 16 domains that are offered at the UG, PG, & PhD levels.
Find below the eligibility and selection criteria:
Guru Kashi University 2025- Admission Process
Find below the detailed process for Guru Kashi University admissions 2025:
1: Guru Kashi University Application Process 2025

Just so you know – the filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Guru Kashi University. However, the application & entrance test fee will be paid online & candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the 2 copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
2: Selection Rounds
Admission to all the PG courses at Guru Kashi University is entrance-based.
3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After completing all the selection rounds, candidates must appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of the Guru Kashi University fee to secure their seats.

courses_data.name: Guru Kashi University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Guru Kashi University's MBA/PGDM programme in Agri Business Management for 2025 offers 75 seats. Eligibility requires a 45% score in both graduation and CBSE 12th exams. The programme accepts scores from CAT, MAT, XAT, and CMAT exams.

faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University - GKU accept CAT for MBA?
faqs.answer: Guru Kashi University is one of the top MBA colleges in India. It is a 2-year full time program. Yes, it accepts CAT ( Common Admission Test) for MBA but it's not compulsory to give thai exam. CAT exam is an entrances exam which is widely accepted in manh colleges but it is not mandatory for all MBA admission. You can also find many other alternatives for CAT like CMAT, GMAT, MAT and XATXAT entrance exam which are also accepted by many colleges.

placement_data.title: Guru Kashi University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The highest package offered during Guru Kashi University placements in recent past stood at INR 100 LPA . The top recruiters in recent past included U Mumba , PlanetSpark and TCS

faqs.question: Is Guru Kashi University good for placements?
faqs.answer: Placements are good, approximately 90% of students get placed. Top companies come and recruit the students. It is the top recruiting university. The highest package offered here was 7 LPA and Average package is around 2-3 LPA and good packages are offered. Roles such as marketing are offered in the agriculture course.

faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University offers internships to MBA students?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Kashi University does offer internships to MBA students. There are a number of documents and PdF on the university's official website that include information about the placement cell and internship opportunities given by the university. However, GKU Bathinda does not specify the duration of internships for MBA students.

faqs.question: Are MBA placements at Guru Kashi University good?
faqs.answer: Almost every student at Guru Kashi University (GKU) gets placement in top MNCs. The average package is around INR 3 lakhs, the highest package is around INR 6,50,000 lakhs, and the minimum salary for the students is INR 1,50,000 per annum.

faqs.question: Are there any govt. job opportunities that I can seek after completing BCom from Guru Kashi University?
faqs.answer: Yes, students who are pursuing their BCom degree from Guru Kashi University can apply to various government job. They can look forward to placements related to Finance, Auditing, Financial Administration, Taxation, etc. For most of the government jobs, graduates are required to appear for competitive exams conducted by various recruiting organisations. Tabulated below are some prospective government jobs for BCom graduates along with their average salaries: Bank Probationary Officer (PO): INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA LIC AAO: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk: INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RRB NTPC: INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA SSC CHSL: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS PO: INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned salary package are industry-based average payouts. faqs.question: How much does BA cost in Guru Kashi University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for BA courses at Guru Kashi University range from INR 84,000 to INR 1.1 lakh. Additionally, the hostel fees for BA courses range from INR 1.3 Lacs to 3.3 lakh. The student has to produce a hostel fee receipt along with a hostel admission form. Candidates must note: The above-mentioned fees are sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence , is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for the BPharm programme at Guru Kashi University?
faqs.answer: The application fee for BPharm courses at Guru Kashi University, also called registration fees ranges between INR 2,800 and INR 3,000. The total tuition fees for the BPharm course at GKU Bhatinda range from INR 2.1 Lacs to INR 3.2 lakh. Additionally, the hostel fees is INR 1.95 lakh. The above-mentioned fees are sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence , is indicative.

faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at Guru Kashi University expensive?
faqs.answer: Punjab, India, starts at INR 2 Lacs and can go up to INR 25 Lacs per year. Some say the fees are expensive, with the first and second semesters costing INR 62,580 and the second year costing INR 60,580

faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University refund fees?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Kashi University (GKU) in Talwandi Sabo, Bathinda, offers a 100% fee refund policy for students who withdraw from admission, according to their policy and without any charges . GKU is recognised by the UGC and has been accredited by NAAC with an A+

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best universities in Punjab to do the BCA course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my department are excellent. It has a 24x7 Wi-Fi facility. There are many labs for different subjects. Classrooms are good. There is a huge library in which more than 500 students can study at one time.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied by the mess food quality, roads, and the college life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Classrooms are also good, and Wi-Fi is available in hostel libraries. The hostel facilities is good, and the mess food quality is good in some hostels, and in some hostels it is bad. The sports tournament is held at our university every year. The canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are more experienced and now there are new facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the course and the college are good as well. The labs and fields are there for better knowledge. Staff is also good but the new staff is just okay not that much good. Hostel looks good but I never lived in a hostel. The food of the hostel is not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college.
reviews.review_text: It has many buildings and departments according to different fields, and each department is very well maintained. There are plenty of canteens around the departments for lunch, as well as a library, computer lab, etc. It also has a park.

reviews.review_heading: Best university in Punjab, and all faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The department offers a well-equipped lab, Wi-Fi, best classroom, and a smart library with ample resources. Hostels have decent facilities including clean rooms, attached bathrooms, Wi-Fi, and study space. The mess food is average but hygienic. Medical facilities are available. Gym is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, but placement percentage is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best, and the buildings are superb. You can get free Wi-Fi, advanced labs, and a library here, but the classrooms are average not bad, but not the best. Hostels are good, and the food is also good. I was living in Shivalik Hostel, and that was awesome. Sports ground, medical facilities, and games, everything is good.

reviews.review_heading: The university is very good, the faculty is very good, but the placement is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There are two types of hostels, on-campus and off-campus. For off-campus hostels, two-seater and three-seater rooms are available. The campus has Wi-Fi, mess, and canteen facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and Supportive behaviour of the Staffs
reviews.review_text: Hostels are divided into three facilities :- A/C, Cooler, and fan. There are two playgrounds for the students to play. It is fully covered by wifi . Meals are awesome. Wardens are more supportive. There are central library, and many computer labs are available.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied because there is no good infrastructure, campus and management.
reviews.review_text:
Hostels are not good not bad, just average. 
But college infrastructure like labs and classrooms is not good, and sittings are also bad.
The main issue in summers is no proper fan working and in labs there is no AC.
In classrooms, there are only 5 fans, and strength of the students is 60.

reviews.review_heading: A glance of GKU. Faculty is very cooperative.
reviews.review_text: The labs are equipped with modern instruments but we rarely use them. Classes are normal at any school in the city. There is no air conditioning in classes. Wi-Fi facility only for faculty members. Projectors are there in some classrooms. The boys hostel rooms have attached washrooms, while the girls hostel does not. Average medical facilities are there. Mess food is very bad. Sports and game facilities are the best. Our university will rank 5th in Khelo, India, in 2023.

reviews.review_heading: If you have a budget above INR 4 lakhs for MBA, don't consider GKU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Classes are equipped with fans but no ACs. Yes, we have projectors in classrooms but no proper board for that. There is one smart lab & computer lab, but again with limited facilities. Yes, the quality of food in the hostel mess is good but rooms are overcrowded with 4 boys in a single room.

reviews.review_heading: Great Faculty and family-like College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our course, such as Books, Materials, Records, and Bluebooks for internals, we should pay for. In classrooms, there are Fans and Smart-TVs. The Library offers all facilities. Classrooms are large and spacious. The Hostel facilities are great. They offer more facilities, like food in the Mess. The quality of food in Mess is good. Medical facilities and many facilities. The Infrastructure of the College is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty and facilities offered by the GKU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the GKU available for the MBA was good. The college had a pretty big and beautiful campus. Facilities like Wi-Fi, computers, labs, libraries, canteens, halls, auditoriums, etc. were given to the students. A hostel was available for the students of the college. The facilities offered at the college were above average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Kashi University.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available in our classrooms with developed infrastructure. Digital classrooms are available with free Wi-Fi facilities. Many sports facilities are available in our college. The mess available in our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a mind-blowing university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is mind-blowing. Hostel gives a homely feeling home. Food served in the mess is very good. Physical education is good. All the facilities are available in the mess. Doctor is available at the university. Library and computer lab are available.

overview_faqs.question: Is Uttaranchal (P.G.) College of Bio-Medical Sciences and Hospital a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Uttaranchal (P.G.) College of Bio-Medical Sciences and Hospital is a reputed institute for MPT, M.Sc., B.Sc., BPT, UG Diploma, GNM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences, Science, Nursing. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Uttaranchal (P.G.) College of Bio-Medical Sciences and Hospital has a review rating of 3.5 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.3 on campuslife, 3.1 on placements, 4.2 on faculty and 3.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: UCBMSH Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very nice.

content.Placements: Our BPT batch is specially organized for those people who have been suffering from severe injuries, and our BPT team provides support to their bodies to regain muscle strength and help them live their lives. In the past few years, many students from our college have worked in top hospitals in Dehradun or India.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very good; labs, library, and Wi-Fi are also available in my college. They provide books and college uniforms. The hostel is the best in comparison to others. The mess food quality is also good, and a canteen is available. Other activities are held on Saturdays.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good and helpful faculty members.

content.Placements: Placement was average. The highest package given to the student who worked in a physiotherapy clinic was 8 LPA but I did not know about the lowest package. Company only hired students with good grades, so if you want to be placed, work hard.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was not really good but the campus contained the things that were required for the course physiotherapy for examples OPD laboratory, pathology labs, etc. College also had a mess and cafeteria inside which provided good food for the students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Good strengths of students are placed in our course for BPT. This course has 42 students. A good package is provided to students passed from here. Students are placed in well-known hospitals. A good amount of people got internships from our college in well-known hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and the infrastructure available for the course are the best. Wi-Fi is not allowed for the students in the classroom but a good sack of books is available for everyone. The quality of food provided in the mess is not so good but is also not too bad. It is acceptable.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I'm well satisfied by the college and teachers.

content.Placements: Good amount of students are placed in our course almost 42% of students are placed from our course. A good amount of students are placed in well-known top hospitals and rehabilitation centers. A good percentage of students got internships from this college. Top roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are the best. Classrooms are not smart but good enough. The bus facilities are provided for postings. The facility provided in a hostel is very bad. The quality of the food and the conditions of the rooms are not so good. Only a volleyball court is available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am very much satisfied with the faculty of the college.

content.Placements: Placement in the college is very good. Many hospitals have hired physiotherapists from here, and a good amount of package is provided to them. Many of the students from the college are in well-known hospitals in our country, and the package for them is a very nice amount. All the students who have passed out from this college have been in a good position in a well-known hospital.
content.Infrastructure: All types of facilities are provided to each and every student, and the infrastructure is good. The quality of facilities and the quality of food provided in the mess and canteen are good. The quality of sports equipment present in the hostel for extracurricular activities is not good. So, I would like to recommend that you not take or go to the hostel because the facilities of the hostel are not very good.

College of Bio-Medical Sciences and Hospital has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.Sc.Candidates who have completed B.Sc. in CBZ/Industrial Microbiology are also eligible to apply.B.Sc.Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognized school/board.UG DiplomaCandidate must have completed 10+2 from any recognised Board/Council.GNMRegistered ANM with pass mark.

faqs.question: When can I apply for BSc course at Uttaranchal (P.G.) College of Bio-Medical Sciences and Hospital?
faqs.answer: Candidates can apply for the BSc course at UCBMSH once they have cleared their Class 12 exams. Candidates applying for the programme can fill the application form while appearing for the exam or apply once the results are announced. If candidates don't want to apply for the course right after they have cleared Class 12, they can do that also, as there is no age bar to apply for the programme.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BSc course at UCBMSH?
faqs.answer: Candidates applying for admission into any course at UCBMSH will have to meet the eligibility criteria, which is a minimum aggregate of 45% - 55% in the last qualifying exam, depening on the programme. Candidates applying for admission in the BSc programme will have to secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12 to be eligible. Once they are eligible they can apply for admission into the programme.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Uttaranchal (P.G.) College of Bio-Medical Sciences and Hospital?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by Uttaranchal (P.G.) College of Bio-Medical Sciences and Hospital are approved by eminent Government bodies like INC. The combined seats available for courses offered at Uttaranchal (P.G.) College of Bio-Medical Sciences and Hospital goes up to 1425.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: 75% of students got placement in my course, and my course had a package of Rs 50,000 to Rs 100,000.

review_content.Placements: 75% of students got placement in my course. My course had a package of Rs 50,000 to Rs 100,000 at Raipur Institute of Medical Science. In my course, 90% of people get internships in their own hospital, RIMS. The best training is given in our hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has about 20 classrooms, 1 lecture room, 1 auditorium, and a boys' hostel with at least 50 rooms, along with a girls' hostel that also has 50 rooms. There is a canteen where the food is clean and neat.
review_content.Faculty: All the teachers here are very understanding and professional. Yes, it prepares the student for the industry. In this college, the exam is held early in the semester, and the passing number is 100/50. I feel that our college is the best in Raipur because, along with your superspecialist hospital, you also get the best campus. You are getting internships in your own hospital, so what else is good about it?

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Fantastic college, you will learn a lot more here.

review_content.Placements: The placement is okay. The package depends on state to state, government, and private hospitals. There is no such meaning as placement in the medical profession. The top role offered just after the undergraduate is a junior resident doctor in AIIMS.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is available there but the infrastructure is not that good. The building is not well painted and is just whitewashed. However, it is okay from the inside. The mess food is okay and the hostel rooms are good. Sports and games are not regularly played.
